tasks.testStrategy: Verify migration idempotent, reversible, existing orgs get type='standalone' and parent_org_id=NULL. Test trigger rejects invalid hierarchy states. Acceptance #1-4.

subtasks.title: Add new columns to organizations table idempotently

subtasks.details: Use TEXT for type with DEFAULT 'standalone', INTEGER for parent_org_id allowing NULL, BOOLEAN for support_grants_require_approval with DEFAULT false. Ensure backward compatibility by making changes non-blocking.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify columns added only once when run multiple times. Check defaults applied to existing rows using prod snapshot.

subtasks.title: Add constraints and indexes on organizations columns
subtasks.description: Implement CHECK constraint on organizations.type, foreign key on parent_org_id, and create indexes on parent_org_id and type as specified in PRD §6.1.
subtasks.details: CHECK (type IN ('standalone', 'reseller', 'customer')). FK parent_org_id REFERENCES organizations(id) with hierarchy validation deferred to trigger. CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY for production safety.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate constraint violations prevented. Confirm index usage via EXPLAIN on prod snapshot queries.

subtasks.title: Implement enforce_org_hierarchy() trigger function
subtasks.description: Create PL/pgSQL function enforce_org_hierarchy() that validates no circular references and proper parent-child relationships in organizations hierarchy.
subtasks.details: Function checks INSERT/UPDATE operations: parent_org_id not self-referencing, no cycles via recursive CTE, type consistency. Use RAISE EXCEPTION on violations.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test function independently with sample hierarchy inserts/updates on prod snapshot.

subtasks.title: Create and attach organizations hierarchy trigger
subtasks.description: Attach AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE trigger on organizations table calling enforce_org_hierarchy() function for all hierarchy mutations.
subtasks.details: CREATE TRIGGER enforce_org_hierarchy_trigger AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OF parent_org_id, type ON organizations FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION enforce_org_hierarchy().
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify trigger fires and rejects invalid states like cycles or self-references. Confirm valid hierarchies allowed.

subtasks.title: Comprehensive testing and validation on prod snapshot
subtasks.description: Run full migration idempotently multiple times, validate data integrity, test trigger enforcement, and confirm existing orgs have correct defaults.
subtasks.details: Test: idempotency (run 3x), existing orgs get type='standalone' parent_org_id=NULL, trigger rejects cycles/self-refs, indexes present, no performance regression.
subtasks.testStrategy: Acceptance criteria #1-4: Verify migration reversible, all constraints active, query plans utilize indexes, no data loss on 100k+ row prod snapshot dataset.

tasks.title: Write migration 007_rls_enable.sql

subtasks.title: List and verify the 13 tables for RLS enablement

subtasks.title: Write ALTER TABLE statements to enable RLS
subtasks.description: Generate SQL ALTER TABLE ... ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY commands for all 13 tables.
subtasks.details: Use 'ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS table_name ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;' pattern for safety. Group in transaction or sequentially. Add comments referencing PRD §6.6.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify with \d+ table_name or SELECT schemaname,tablename, rowsecurity FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename IN (...);

subtasks.title: Create initial permissive RLS policies
subtasks.description: Implement permissive policies that allow existing access patterns to continue working.
subtasks.details: Create policies like 'CREATE POLICY permissive_all ON table_name FOR ALL USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);' initially. Ensure SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE covered.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test existing app queries succeed post-migration. Verify policy exists: \d+ table_name.

subtasks.title: Implement app.bypass_rls shadow-mode toggle
subtasks.description: Add session variable logic to bypass RLS in shadow mode for controlled rollout.
subtasks.details: Create policies checking current_setting('app.bypass_rls', true)::boolean, e.g., USING (current_setting('app.bypass_rls', true) OR true). Set via SET app.bypass_rls = 'true'; in app.
subtasks.testStrategy: SET app.bypass_rls='true'; SELECT * FROM table_name LIMIT 1; then RESET; verify access changes.

subtasks.title: Add migration structure, comments, and rollback
subtasks.description: Finalize migration file with proper structure, documentation, and rollback plan.
subtasks.details: Structure as -- Migration 007_rls_enable.sql with DO $$ BEGIN ... EXCEPTION ... END $$; for safety. Include rollback: ALTER TABLE ... DISABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; DROP POLICY ...
subtasks.testStrategy: Run migration, verify Acceptance #23-26 criteria. Test full rollback restores prior state.

tasks.description: Add required schema changes for organizations, reseller_members, impersonation_sessions, reseller_admin_audit tables and indexes
tasks.details:
[CROSS-TAG BLOCKER] Schema migrations here must sit AFTER reseller-tenancy #1-3 in apply order.

Create migrations/: Add organizations.type ENUM('reseller','customer','direct'), organizations.parent_org_id BIGINT FK REFERENCES organizations(id), organizations.suspended_at TIMESTAMP NULL. Create reseller_members(reseller_org_id, user_id, role ENUM('reseller_owner','reseller_admin','reseller_support','reseller_billing','reseller_readonly'), UNIQUE(reseller_org_id,user_id)). Create impersonation_sessions table per §9.1 schema. Create reseller_admin_audit table matching admin_audit_log pattern. Add indexes: organizations(parent_org_id), organizations.name GIN(trigram), org_members(email) GIN, impersonation_sessions(reseller_org_id,actor_user_id,ended_at), reseller_admin_audit(reseller_org_id,created_at DESC).
tasks.testStrategy: Migration up/down tests pass. Verify indexes exist via EXPLAIN ANALYZE. Seed test data and verify row-level isolation: reseller A cannot query reseller B customers.

subtasks.title: Add columns to organizations table
subtasks.description: Create migration to add type ENUM, parent_org_id FK, and suspended_at to organizations table
subtasks.details: ALTER TABLE organizations ADD COLUMN type ENUM('reseller','customer','direct') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'direct'; ADD COLUMN parent_org_id BIGINT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id); ADD COLUMN suspended_at TIMESTAMP NULL; Update existing records to type='direct' WHERE parent_org_id IS NULL.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify columns exist and have correct types/constraints after migration up. Test down migration restores original schema.

subtasks.title: Create reseller_members table
subtasks.description: Create reseller_members table with reseller_org_id, user_id, role ENUM and unique constraint
subtasks.details: CREATE TABLE reseller_members (id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, reseller_org_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id), user_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id), role ENUM('reseller_owner','reseller_admin','reseller_support','reseller_billing','reseller_readonly') NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(), UNIQUE(reseller_org_id, user_id));
subtasks.testStrategy: Migration up/down passes. Verify table structure, FK constraints, unique constraint prevents duplicate memberships.

subtasks.title: Create impersonation_sessions table
subtasks.description: Create impersonation_sessions table following §9.1 schema specification
subtasks.details: CREATE TABLE impersonation_sessions per §9.1 schema with columns including reseller_org_id, actor_user_id, target_user_id, started_at, ended_at, metadata JSONB; Add appropriate indexes and constraints as specified in schema document.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify table matches §9.1 schema exactly. Test migration up/down. Confirm FK relationships to organizations and users.

subtasks.title: Create reseller_admin_audit table
subtasks.description: Create reseller_admin_audit table matching admin_audit_log table pattern
subtasks.details: CREATE TABLE reseller_admin_audit matching admin_audit_log structure: id, reseller_org_id BIGINT REFERENCES organizations(id), actor_user_id BIGINT, target_customer_id BIGINT, event VARCHAR, metadata JSONB, created_at TIMESTAMP; Add indexes on (reseller_org_id, created_at DESC).
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify table structure matches admin_audit_log pattern. Confirm indexes exist via EXPLAIN. Migration up/down passes.

subtasks.title: Add all required indexes
subtasks.description: Create GIN indexes and composite indexes specified for reseller schema
subtasks.details: CREATE INDEX ON organizations(parent_org_id); CREATE INDEX organizations_name_trgm ON organizations USING GIN(name gin_trgm_ops); CREATE INDEX org_members_email_trgm ON org_members USING GIN(email gin_trgm_ops); CREATE INDEX ON impersonation_sessions(reseller_org_id, actor_user_id, ended_at); CREATE INDEX ON reseller_admin_audit(reseller_org_id, created_at DESC);
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify all indexes exist and are usable via EXPLAIN ANALYZE. Test index-only scans where applicable. Confirm migration down removes indexes cleanly.

tasks.title: Implement reseller-service core CRUD
tasks.description: Build foundational reseller-service.ts for org lookup, membership validation, and basic queries
tasks.details: Implement getResellerOr404(resellerId, userId): validates membership and role, returns org or throws 404. Implement listCustomers(resellerId): SELECT * FROM organizations WHERE parent_org_id=? AND type='customer'. Implement getCustomerOr404(resellerId, customerId): validates parent_org_id=resellerId. Add row-level security: every query WHERE parent_org_id = ? OR reseller_org_id = ?.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests cover happy path, 404 cases (wrong parent, no membership), role hierarchy. Integration test with seeded 2-reseller fixture verifies zero leakage.

subtasks.title: Create reseller-service.ts file and implement getResellerOr404
subtasks.description: Implement getResellerOr404(resellerId, userId) function that validates user membership and role, returns organization or throws 404 error.
subtasks.details: Query organizations table by resellerId, check user membership via membership-service, verify role hierarchy (owner/admin), throw NotFoundException if invalid.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test happy path (valid member), 404 for non-member, 404 for wrong role; mock membership-service.

subtasks.title: Implement listCustomers function
subtasks.description: Create listCustomers(resellerId) that returns all customer organizations where parent_org_id = resellerId and type = 'customer'.
subtasks.details: Execute SQL: SELECT * FROM organizations WHERE parent_org_id = ? AND type = 'customer'; apply row-level security filter.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test returns correct customers for valid resellerId, empty array for no customers; integration with seeded data.

subtasks.title: Implement getCustomerOr404 function
subtasks.description: Build getCustomerOr404(resellerId, customerId) that validates parent_org_id matches resellerId and returns customer or 404.
subtasks.details: Query organizations by customerId, assert parent_org_id === resellerId, throw 404 if mismatch or not found.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test happy path, 404 for wrong parent_org_id, 404 for non-existent customer.

subtasks.title: Add row-level security to all queries
subtasks.description: Apply RLS filter to every query: WHERE parent_org_id = ? OR reseller_org_id = ? using current session context.
subtasks.details: Create helper function getRLSFilter(userContext) returning SQL condition; inject into all organization queries in service.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify queries include RLS clause; test zero data leakage between resellers using 2-reseller fixture.

subtasks.title: Write comprehensive unit and integration tests
subtasks.description: Create unit tests for all functions covering happy paths, 404 cases, role validation; integration tests with 2-reseller fixture.
subtasks.details: Use Jest, mock DB/membership-service; test role hierarchy, no leakage across resellers, RLS enforcement.
subtasks.testStrategy: 100% coverage: happy path, wrong parent, no membership, role checks; integration verifies isolation.

tasks.title: Build reseller dashboard service and view
tasks.description: Implement reseller-dashboard-service.ts with tiles and src/web/templates/reseller-dashboard.ts
tasks.details: Create GET /api/reseller/:id/dashboard/summary returning {customerCount:{total,active,trial,suspended}, mrr:{current,trend}, usage:{thisPeriod}, incidents:{count}}. Use reseller_mrr_snapshot materialized view + 60s Redis memoization. Fan-out to dashboard-service.ts per customer as fallback. Template shows tiles above fold, activity feed below. Top 5 customers table clickable to drill-in.
tasks.testStrategy: Load test: seed 100 customers, verify p95<2s. Unit test memoization hit/miss. Template renders correctly with mock data. Verify MRR calculation matches msp-billing assumptions.

subtasks.title: Implement reseller_mrr_snapshot materialized view
subtasks.description: Create the SQL materialized view reseller_mrr_snapshot aggregating MRR data per reseller from customer billing data.
subtasks.details: Define view with current MRR, trend (e.g., MoM %), customer counts (total/active/trial/suspended) using organizations table joins with billing snapshots. Refresh every hour via cron.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify view returns correct aggregations against seeded 10-customer reseller data. Check refresh updates after billing changes.

subtasks.title: Build GET /api/reseller/:id/dashboard/summary endpoint
subtasks.description: Implement reseller-dashboard-service.ts with primary query from materialized view and 60s Redis memoization.
subtasks.details: Use getResellerOr404 from task 3. Query reseller_mrr_snapshot for {customerCount, mrr:{current,trend}, usage:{thisPeriod}, incidents:{count}}. Cache in Redis with 60s TTL keyed by resellerId.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test memoization hit/miss logic. Integration test verifies data structure and 404 on invalid reseller.

subtasks.title: Add fan-out fallback to per-customer dashboard-service
subtasks.description: Implement fallback aggregation by fanning out to dashboard-service.ts for each customer if materialized view unavailable.
subtasks.details: On cache miss or view error, listCustomers(resellerId) then parallel GET /api/customer/:id/dashboard/summary, aggregate counts/MRR/usage/incidents. Limit to top 50 customers.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock dashboard-service failures, verify fallback sums correctly. Load test p95<2s with 100 customers.

subtasks.title: Create reseller-dashboard.ts template with tiles and table
subtasks.description: Build src/web/templates/reseller-dashboard.ts showing KPI tiles above fold, activity feed, and top 5 customers table.
subtasks.details: Tiles: customer counts, MRR current/trend, usage thisPeriod, incidents count. Top 5 customers table by MRR clickable to /reseller/:id/customer/:id. Activity feed from audit logs (task 14).
subtasks.testStrategy: Render with mock data, verify tiles display correctly, table links navigate properly. Responsive on mobile.

subtasks.title: Add route mounting and integration tests
subtasks.description: Mount dashboard route at /admin/reseller/:id/dashboard and implement full test suite.
subtasks.details: Register in src/reseller/routes.ts behind RESELLER_CONSOLE_ENABLED flag with requireResellerAccess middleware. Seed 100 customers for load test verifying p95<2s.
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end: valid reseller sees data (200), invalid (404), flag off (404). MRR matches msp-billing calculations. Template renders with real endpoint data.

tasks.title: Build customer list view and search endpoint
tasks.description: Implement reseller-customer-list.ts + GET /api/reseller/:id/customers with search/filter/sort/pagination
tasks.details: Endpoint supports q= (trigram search name/email/orgId), status=, plan=, sort=, page=, pageSize=25-100. Returns {items,total,page,pageSize}. Template: table with columns from §7.2, server-side controls, empty state CTA to /customers/new. Add GIN indexes if missing.
tasks.testStrategy: Performance test: 500 customers, verify <500ms p95 first byte. Search accuracy test: substring matches, fuzzy via trigram. Pagination edge cases (page=0, pageSize=100, total=0).

subtasks.title: Add GIN indexes for trigram search on customer fields
subtasks.description: Create GIN indexes on name, email, and orgId columns in the organizations table to support efficient trigram search queries.
subtasks.details: Use CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_organizations_name_gin ON organizations USING GIN(name gin_trgm_ops); repeat for email and org_id. Verify indexes exist before proceeding to avoid redundant creation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Query pg_indexes to confirm GIN indexes with gin_trgm_ops exist. Test EXPLAIN ANALYZE on sample trigram query to verify index usage.

subtasks.title: Implement GET /api/reseller/:id/customers backend endpoint
subtasks.description: Build the API endpoint handling q=, status=, plan=, sort=, page=, pageSize=25-100 parameters with proper validation and return {items,total,page,pageSize}.
subtasks.details: Use reseller-service listCustomers base query, add WHERE clauses for filters (trigram ILIKE for q% on name/email/orgId), ORDER BY sort param, LIMIT/OFFSET for pagination. Validate reseller membership via getResellerOr404.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test all param combos: q=fuzzy, status=active/suspended, plan=basic/pro, sort=name-desc, page=2&pageSize=50. Verify total count accurate with filters.

subtasks.title: Create reseller-customer-list.ts frontend template
subtasks.description: Build the TypeScript template with table displaying columns from §7.2, server-side search/filter/sort/pagination controls, and empty state CTA.
subtasks.details: Table columns per §7.2 spec (name,status,plan,created,etc). Server-side controls: search input, status/plan dropdowns, sort dropdown, pagination (page size 25-100). Empty state: 'No customers yet' + link to /customers/new.
subtasks.testStrategy: Render with mock data: verify all columns display, controls trigger API calls with correct params, empty state shows CTA button that navigates correctly.

subtasks.title: Integrate frontend template with backend API
subtasks.description: Connect reseller-customer-list.ts to call GET /api/reseller/:id/customers endpoint and handle response data rendering with loading/error states.
subtasks.details: Use fetch/API client to call endpoint with query params from controls. Map items[] to table rows. Handle {items,total,page,pageSize} for pagination math. Add loading spinner, error toast for 4xx/5xx.
subtasks.testStrategy: E2E: type search 'acme', verify API call has q=acme, table updates <2s. Change pageSize=50, verify new API call and table row count. Network fail shows error.

subtasks.title: Add performance and accuracy testing for list endpoint
subtasks.description: Implement comprehensive tests for search accuracy, pagination edge cases, and performance benchmarks as specified in task details.
subtasks.details: Load 500 customer fixture. Test trigram substring/fuzzy matches. Edge cases: page=0→1, pageSize=100, total=0. Performance: measure p95 first byte <500ms with Artillery/JMeter.
subtasks.testStrategy: Automated suite: 100% pass rate required. Performance: 500 customers, p95<500ms. Accuracy: 20 test cases (exact, substring, no-match). Pagination: page=999→empty, total=1→pageSize=100.

tasks.title: Implement new customer provisioning flow
tasks.description: Build provisioning-service.ts + reseller-new-customer.ts + POST /api/reseller/:id/customers
tasks.details: Multi-step form per §7.3. POST payload validation. Transaction: create customer org (type='customer', parent_org_id, plan), create invitation via invitation-service.ts, return {org,invite}. Idempotent via client-supplied idempotency_key header (store+dedup 24h). Emit reseller.customer.provisioned telemetry. Success page: copyable invite URL, email button, drill-in link.
tasks.testStrategy: E2E: complete form → verify org+invite created, no secrets visible. Double-submit same key → exactly 1 org. Different keys → 2 orgs. Role test: only owner/admin can provision.

subtasks.title: Implement multi-step provisioning form UI
subtasks.description: Build reseller-new-customer.ts with multi-step form following §7.3 spec for collecting customer details like name, plan, and email.
subtasks.details: Use state management for steps (e.g., basic info, plan selection, confirmation). Include validation on each step, progress indicator, and navigation buttons. Ensure responsive design for reseller dashboard.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test form validation and state transitions. Visual regression tests for each step. Accessibility checks with screen reader simulation.

subtasks.title: Create provisioning service with transaction logic
subtasks.description: Develop provisioning-service.ts to handle customer org creation and invitation in a database transaction.
subtasks.details: Implement createCustomerOrg(type='customer', parent_org_id=resellerId, plan) and call invitation-service.ts to generate invite. Wrap in transaction to ensure atomicity. Return {org, invite} on success.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for happy path and rollback on invitation failure. Mock invitation-service. Verify org fields and parent_org_id set correctly.

subtasks.title: Add POST endpoint with payload validation and idempotency
subtasks.description: Implement POST /api/reseller/:id/customers endpoint with Zod/Joi validation and idempotency key handling.
subtasks.details: Validate POST payload for required fields (name, plan, email). Check idempotency_key header: store in dedup table (24h TTL), skip if exists and return cached result, else proceed and store.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests: valid payload creates org, invalid throws 400. Same key double-submit: 1 org. Different keys: 2 orgs. Expired key allows new provision.

subtasks.title: Integrate reseller authorization and telemetry
subtasks.description: Add reseller-service checks and emit reseller.customer.provisioned telemetry event.
subtasks.details: Use getResellerOr404(resellerId, userId) for membership/role validation (owner/admin). On success, emit telemetry with org/invite details. Ensure RLS compliance.
subtasks.testStrategy: Role tests: owner succeeds, non-admin 403. Verify telemetry emitted via mock observer. Non-reseller ID throws 404.

subtasks.title: Build success page with invite actions
subtasks.description: Create success page in reseller-new-customer.ts showing copyable invite URL, email button, and drill-in link.
subtasks.details: Display {org.name, invite.token} securely (no secrets). Add copy-to-clipboard for invite URL, email composer prefilled with invite link, link to customer dashboard. Handle errors gracefully.
subtasks.testStrategy: E2E: complete form → land on success page, verify copy/email works, no sensitive data in DOM. Role test: only authorized users provision.

tasks.title: Build per-customer drill-in shell and overview
tasks.description: Create reseller-customer-overview.ts with header, breadcrumb, 6 sub-tabs structure
tasks.details: Pinned header: name, plan/status badges, Impersonate button, Suspend toggle. Tabs: Overview (read-only team-overview metrics), Users, Connections, Audit, Billing, Suspend modal. Breadcrumb: Reseller > Customers > {name}. Shell detects active impersonation session.
tasks.testStrategy: Template renders all tabs with mock data. Navigation between tabs preserves state. Header badges update on status change. Read-only verification: no forms/actions visible.

subtasks.title: Create reseller-customer-overview.ts base shell
subtasks.description: Initialize the main template file with overall structure including container for header, breadcrumb, and tab navigation.
subtasks.details: Use existing reseller dashboard layout as reference. Include pinned header slot, breadcrumb slot, and tab container with 6 tab placeholders. Ensure responsive design for desktop and tablet.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify shell renders without errors using mock customer data. Check layout integrity across viewport sizes.

subtasks.title: Implement breadcrumb and pinned header
subtasks.description: Build breadcrumb navigation 'Reseller > Customers > {customerName}' and pinned header with customer name, plan/status badges, Impersonate button, and Suspend toggle.
subtasks.details: Fetch customer data via API. Make header sticky on scroll. Badges use color-coded status/plan icons. Impersonate links to session start endpoint. Suspend toggle shows confirmation modal.
subtasks.testStrategy: Confirm breadcrumb links navigate correctly. Header remains pinned during scroll. Toggle updates UI state immediately.

subtasks.title: Add 6 sub-tabs structure with Overview tab
subtasks.description: Integrate tab navigation for Overview, Users, Connections, Audit, Billing, Suspend. Implement Overview tab as read-only team-overview metrics display.
subtasks.details: Use client-side tab state management. Overview pulls metrics from customer org API (usage, active users, etc.). Display in cards/charts, no edit forms. Lazy-load tab content.
subtasks.testStrategy: Tab switching preserves scroll position. Overview shows mock metrics correctly. Verify read-only: no input fields or buttons.

subtasks.title: Build Suspend modal and toggle integration
subtasks.description: Create Suspend modal with confirmation, reason dropdown, and submit/cancel. Wire Suspend toggle in header to open modal and handle API call.
subtasks.details: Modal includes customer name, current status warning, optional notes field. On submit, call suspend API and refresh badges/header. Handle errors with toast notifications.
subtasks.testStrategy: Modal opens/closes correctly. Submit updates status badge and audit log. Cancel preserves state. Edge case: already suspended customer.

subtasks.title: Implement active impersonation session detection
subtasks.description: Add logic to detect if user is in active impersonation session for this customer and adjust UI accordingly (e.g., enable certain actions).
subtasks.details: Check session store or API flag on load and poll every 30s. Show impersonation banner in header. Disable Suspend during impersonation. Update badges to reflect session state.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock session flags: normal vs impersonating. Verify UI changes (banner visible, actions enabled/disabled). State persists on tab switch and page reload.

tasks.title: Implement impersonation service and session management
tasks.description: Build impersonation-service.ts + POST /api/reseller/:id/impersonation-sessions + session cookie logic
tasks.details: Modal collects reason(10+ chars), ticketId, duration(15/30/60m). Create impersonation_session record. Set customer-scoped session cookie with impersonating=true + session.id claim. Redirect to /team/* with banner injection. Enforce single active session per (actor,customer). Max 60m TTL.
tasks.testStrategy: E2E: start session → verify redirect + banner + audit event. Session expiry test: curl after expires_at → 401. Supersession test: new session ends old one. Role matrix: only owner/admin/support.

subtasks.title: Create impersonation-service.ts core logic
subtasks.description: Implement the service functions to create impersonation sessions including validation, record creation, and single active session enforcement.
subtasks.details: Define createImpersonationSession(resellerId, customerId, actorId, reason, ticketId, duration): validate actor role (owner/admin/support via reseller-service), check/enforce single active session per (actor,customer) by ending prior ones, insert into impersonation_sessions table with expires_at = now() + duration (max 60m), return session.id.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit: valid inputs → session created; invalid role → throws; existing session → old one ended; duration >60m → capped at 60m.

subtasks.title: Implement POST /api/reseller/:id/impersonation-sessions endpoint
subtasks.description: Build the API handler integrating modal inputs, service call, cookie setting, audit logging, and redirect.
subtasks.details: Validate POST body {reason (min 10 chars), ticketId, duration (15/30/60)}, call impersonation-service.createImpersonationSession, set secure customer-scoped session cookie with {impersonating: true, sessionId: session.id} (httpOnly, secure, sameSite=strict, expires=session.expires_at), emit audit event via admin-audit-service, redirect to /team/ with 302.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration: POST valid payload → 302 redirect + cookie set + DB session record + audit log entry; invalid reason len → 400.

subtasks.title: Add session middleware for impersonation validation
subtasks.description: Extend session parsing middleware to detect and validate impersonation claims during customer requests.
subtasks.details: In session-middleware.ts: if cookie.impersonating=true, verify sessionId exists, !expired (expires_at > now()), actor has valid membership/role in reseller-service; attach req.impersonationSession = {id, customerId, actorId} or reject with 401; propagate to audit tagging.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit: valid/expired/missing session → accept/reject; Integration: curl expired cookie → 401 Unauthorized.

subtasks.title: Implement single active session enforcement and cleanup
subtasks.description: Add logic to end prior sessions and periodic cleanup for expired impersonation sessions.
subtasks.details: In createImpersonationSession: UPDATE impersonation_sessions SET ended_at=now() WHERE actor_id=? AND customer_org_id=? AND ended_at IS NULL AND expires_at > now(); Add cron job or trigger: DELETE/UPDATE expired sessions; Ensure session middleware rejects ended sessions.
subtasks.testStrategy: E2E: create session A → create session B same (actor,customer) → A ended_at set, B active; cron run → expired sessions cleaned.

subtasks.title: Add frontend modal, redirect banner, and role enforcement
subtasks.description: Integrate modal UI, inject impersonation banner on /team/* pages, and enforce role checks.
subtasks.details: Build reseller-impersonation-modal.ts: form with reason textarea (10+ chars validation), ticketId input, duration select (15/30/60m), POST to endpoint; Team templates: if req.impersonationSession, inject dismissible banner 'Impersonated by [actor] (session #[id])'; Frontend role check: hide modal unless owner/admin/support.
subtasks.testStrategy: E2E: non-admin sees no modal; admin: modal submit → redirect + banner visible + cookie present; banner shows correct session details.

tasks.title: Add customer users and connections read-only views
tasks.description: Implement reseller-customer-users.ts and reseller-customer-connections.ts
tasks.details: Users: list org_members for customer org (email,role,joined,last_seen), no actions. Connections: credential-service listVendorConnections(customerId) → show name/created/status only, never decrypt. Revoke button disabled unless impersonating. Use existing templates as reference.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify no decrypt calls to credential-service.ts. Template shows correct read-only tables. Impersonation mode shows action buttons. Cross-reseller isolation test.

subtasks.title: Create reseller-customer-users.ts template
subtasks.description: Implement the base template structure for the customer users read-only view using existing templates as reference.
subtasks.details: Copy structure from existing templates like team-users or similar. Include header, breadcrumb from Task 7, table container for org_members data, and read-only styling. No action buttons or forms.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify template renders without errors, table headers match spec (email,role,joined,last_seen), no interactive elements present.

subtasks.title: Implement users data fetching logic
subtasks.description: Add server-side logic to list org_members for the customer organization with specified fields only.
subtasks.details: Use reseller-service getCustomerOr404 to validate access. Query org_members WHERE org_id = customer.org_id, select email,role,joined_at,last_seen_at. Apply row-level security for cross-reseller isolation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test returns correct fields only. Integration test with seeded customer org verifies data isolation from other resellers.

subtasks.title: Create reseller-customer-connections.ts template
subtasks.description: Implement the base template structure for the customer connections read-only view using existing templates.
subtasks.details: Match styling and layout from users template. Include table for connections with columns name,created,status. Add disabled Revoke button with conditional logic for impersonation. Never show decrypt fields.
subtasks.testStrategy: Template renders table mock data correctly. Revoke button visible but disabled in normal mode, enabled only in impersonation simulation.

subtasks.title: Implement connections data fetching logic
subtasks.description: Fetch vendor connections data via credential-service listVendorConnections(customerId) with read-only fields.
subtasks.details: Call listVendorConnections(customerId) after customer validation. Map response to {name, created, status} only - no decryption or secrets. Ensure no credential exposure in any response.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify API call made with correct customerId. Response contains only specified fields, no decrypt traces in logs or network calls.

subtasks.title: Integrate views into customer overview tabs
subtasks.description: Wire users and connections views into the tab structure from Task 7 with state preservation.
subtasks.details: Add Users and Connections tabs to reseller-customer-overview.ts. Implement tab switching with URL hash or state management. Ensure data refreshes on tab activation. Test impersonation context propagation.
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end: navigate between tabs preserves data/state. Impersonation mode enables revoke. No data leakage between customers. Performance: both tables load <2s with 100 rows.

tasks.title: Implement customer audit and billing views
tasks.description: Build reseller-customer-audit.ts and reseller-customer-billing.ts read-only views
tasks.details: Audit: reuse src/web/templates/team-audit.ts filters, scope to customer org via admin-audit-service.ts. Billing: show plan/usage/next invoice from msp-billing, plan change allowed (owner/admin/billing roles), no payment method details in direct-billing mode.
tasks.testStrategy: Filters work correctly scoped to customer. Plan change emits audit event. Billing role matrix: support sees usage but no plan picker. Data matches msp-billing snapshot.

subtasks.title: Create reseller-customer-audit.ts view template
subtasks.description: Build the read-only audit view for customer organizations by reusing team-audit.ts filters and scoping queries to the specific customer via admin-audit-service.ts.
subtasks.details: Copy src/web/templates/team-audit.ts structure, integrate admin-audit-service.ts with customer org ID filter for row-level scoping. Ensure reseller role validation via reseller-service.ts. Display last 20 events minimum with date range, actor, event type filters.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify filters scope correctly to customer org only; cross-customer isolation; matches team-audit filters; data from reseller_admin_audit table.

subtasks.title: Create reseller-customer-billing.ts view template
subtasks.description: Build the read-only billing view displaying plan, usage, next invoice from msp-billing service, with conditional plan change picker based on roles.
subtasks.details: Fetch data from msp-billing API: current plan, usage metrics, next invoice preview. Hide payment method details in direct-billing mode. Show plan picker only for owner/admin/billing roles. Implement role checks via session or reseller-service.
subtasks.testStrategy: Role matrix: support sees usage/plan but no picker; owner sees picker; data matches msp-billing snapshot; plan change emits audit event.

subtasks.title: Integrate audit view with reseller navigation and permissions
subtasks.description: Add routing, navigation links, and permission checks for the customer audit view within reseller dashboard.
subtasks.details: Mount reseller-customer-audit.ts under /reseller/:id/customers/:cid/audit. Add nav link in customer detail page. Enforce owner/admin/support roles. Reuse reseller-service for membership validation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Access control: unauthorized 403; correct scoping to customer; navigation from customer list works.

subtasks.title: Integrate billing view with reseller navigation and permissions
subtasks.description: Add routing, navigation links, and permission checks for the customer billing view within reseller dashboard.
subtasks.details: Mount reseller-customer-billing.ts under /reseller/:id/customers/:cid/billing. Add nav link in customer detail page. Role-based UI: full access for owner/admin/billing, read-only usage for support.
subtasks.testStrategy: Role matrix tests; navigation functional; conditional plan picker visibility.

subtasks.title: Implement plan change handler and end-to-end testing
subtasks.description: Add plan change functionality in billing view with audit event emission and comprehensive testing for both views.
subtasks.details: Handle plan picker submit: call msp-billing update API, emit audit event via admin-audit-service.ts with customer scoping. No payment changes. E2E: verify data accuracy, role enforcement, audit logs.
subtasks.testStrategy: Plan change → msp-billing updated + audit event; filters scoped correctly; support role no picker; full integration with reseller-service validation.

tasks.title: Implement suspend/unsuspend customer flow
tasks.description: Add suspend/unsuspend endpoints + modal + session invalidation
tasks.details: POST /api/reseller/:id/customers/:cid/suspend + unsuspend with reason text. Set organizations.suspended_at, invalidate customer sessions, redirect customer users to suspended page. Emit audit events. Owner/admin/support roles only.
tasks.testStrategy: Suspend → verify suspended_at set, customer /team/* → suspended page. Unsuspend → clears timestamp. Session invalidation: active customer sessions rejected. Role matrix test.

subtasks.title: Implement suspend and unsuspend API endpoints
subtasks.description: Create POST /api/reseller/:id/customers/:cid/suspend and /unsuspend endpoints that accept reason text, update organizations.suspended_at, and enforce owner/admin/support role checks.
subtasks.details: Use getResellerOr404 and getCustomerOr404 from task 3. For suspend: SET suspended_at=NOW(), reason. For unsuspend: SET suspended_at=NULL. Validate roles via session. Return 200 on success.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test happy path (suspend/unsuspend), 403 unauthorized roles, 404 invalid reseller/customer, validate DB suspended_at changes.

subtasks.title: Implement customer session invalidation logic
subtasks.description: Add service to invalidate all active sessions for a customer organization upon suspension.
subtasks.details: Create invalidateCustomerSessions(customerId): DELETE FROM sessions WHERE org_id IN (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE parent_org_id=customerId). Call from suspend endpoint.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create active sessions for customer users, suspend customer, verify sessions deleted and login fails with invalid session error.

subtasks.title: Add suspend/unsuspend confirmation modal UI
subtasks.description: Build React modal triggered from customer list row actions, with textarea for reason, submit calls suspend/unsuspend endpoints.
subtasks.details: Modal shows current status, reason input (required for suspend), optimistic UI update. Error handling for API failures. Accessible with ARIA labels.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual: open modal, enter reason, submit → verify API call and table row status update. Test cancel, validation errors.

subtasks.title: Implement suspended page redirect and middleware
subtasks.description: Create suspended landing page and middleware that redirects/checks suspended_at for customer org users on /team/* routes.
subtasks.details: Middleware: if org.suspended_at IS NOT NULL, render /suspended page showing reason. Page: 'Account suspended: [reason]', contact support CTA. Cache check.
subtasks.testStrategy: Suspend customer → customer user visits /team/* → verify redirect to suspended page with correct reason. Unsuspend → access restored.

subtasks.title: Integrate audit events for suspend/unsuspend actions
subtasks.description: Emit audit events to reseller_admin_audit for suspend/unsuspend with actor, target_customer_id, reason in metadata.
subtasks.details: After DB update in endpoints: auditService.log({reseller_org_id, actor: session.userId, target_customer_id: cid, event: 'customer.suspend'/'customer.unsuspend', metadata: {reason}}).
subtasks.testStrategy: Suspend/unsuspend → verify audit entry created with correct fields. Check reseller audit view shows events filtered by customer.

tasks.title: Build reseller settings pages
tasks.description: Implement /settings/branding, /invoicing, /payment, /notifications
tasks.details: Branding: form matching src/brand/types.ts::BrandConfig, store per reseller org. Invoicing: business details for MSP→customer invoices. Payment: Stripe Elements for Wyre wholesale payment (read-only display + update flow). Notifications: checkboxes for events in §11. Owner/admin roles (payment→owner/admin/billing).
tasks.testStrategy: Form submission persists correctly. Branding changes don't affect existing customers. Stripe Elements loads without errors. Role matrix: support cannot access settings.

subtasks.title: Implement /settings/branding page and form
subtasks.description: Create the branding settings page with a form matching BrandConfig type from src/brand/types.ts, including storage per reseller organization.
subtasks.details: Build Fastify route GET/POST /settings/branding using requireResellerAccess middleware. Render form fields for logo, colors, fonts per BrandConfig interface. On submit, validate and store in reseller_org table or dedicated branding table with reseller_org_id FK. Apply owner/admin role check.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test form validation and submission persists to DB. Verify non-owner roles get 403. Check branding changes isolated per reseller org.

subtasks.title: Build /settings/invoicing page for business details
subtasks.description: Develop invoicing settings page to manage business details used for MSP-to-customer invoices.
subtasks.details: Implement GET/POST /settings/invoicing route. Form includes company name, address, tax ID, logo for invoice header. Store in reseller_org or new invoicing_settings table. Ensure owner/admin/billing roles can access and update. Integrate with existing invoice generation flow.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test form submission updates details correctly. Verify invoice preview reflects changes. Role-based access: support role denied.

subtasks.title: Create /settings/payment page with Stripe Elements
subtasks.description: Implement payment settings page using Stripe Elements for Wyre wholesale payment, supporting read-only display and update flow.
subtasks.details: Add GET/PATCH /settings/payment route restricted to owner/admin/billing roles. Load Stripe Elements for secure card input. Display current payment method read-only. Update flow: collect new details, call Stripe API to update customer payment method. Handle Wyre wholesale specifics.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock Stripe to test Elements load without errors. Verify update flow tokenizes and saves correctly. Test read-only for non-billing roles.

subtasks.title: Develop /settings/notifications page with event checkboxes
subtasks.description: Build notifications settings page with checkboxes for events defined in section 11 of documentation.
subtasks.details: Create GET/PATCH /settings/notifications route for owner/admin roles. Fetch event list from §11 (e.g., provisioning, suspend, billing events). Display checkboxes grouped by category. Store selections in reseller_notifications table with reseller_org_id. Trigger sample notifications on save.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test checkbox state persists and toggles notifications correctly. Verify unsupported roles cannot access. Check event list matches §11 spec.

subtasks.title: Add shared layout, role guards, and end-to-end testing
subtasks.description: Integrate all settings pages with shared reseller layout and implement comprehensive role-based access controls.
subtasks.details: Use src/web/layout.ts for consistent navigation/tabs across /settings/* pages. Enforce role matrix: payment restricted to owner/admin/billing. Add global error handling for 404/403. Write integration tests simulating full user flows with seeded reseller data.
subtasks.testStrategy: E2E tests: owner updates all sections successfully; support user hits 403 on payment; branding changes don't leak to other resellers. Load test form submissions.

tasks.title: Build MSP team management
tasks.description: Implement /team with reseller_members CRUD + invitation flow
tasks.details: List MSP employees with roles. Add/remove/change role via reseller_members table. Reuse src/org/invitation-service.ts with reseller-scope=true flag. Role matrix from §8. Owner/admin only.
tasks.testStrategy: Invite → verify reseller_members record + email sent. Role change → audit event. Cannot invite to customer orgs. Role permissions enforced on all routes.

subtasks.title: Create /team route and list MSP employees with roles
subtasks.description: Implement the /team page to fetch and display reseller_members for the current reseller org, showing employees and their roles. Restrict access to owner/admin roles only using role matrix from §8.
subtasks.details: Query reseller_members by reseller_org_id from session. Use role matrix §8 for display labels. Template: table with name, email, role, actions (edit/delete). Backend: GET /api/reseller/team.
subtasks.testStrategy: Owner login → see team list. Admin → see list. Non-admin → 403. Verify roles match DB.

subtasks.title: Implement CRUD operations for reseller_members
subtasks.description: Add endpoints for add/remove/change role in reseller_members table. Validate inputs and enforce owner/admin only access per role matrix.
subtasks.details: POST /api/reseller/team/add: {email, role}. PUT /api/reseller/team/:member_id: {role}. DELETE /api/reseller/team/:member_id. Transactional writes, validate role from §8 matrix.
subtasks.testStrategy: Add member → record created. Change role → updated. Delete → removed. Non-admin → 403. Invalid role → error.

subtasks.title: Integrate invitation flow for new team members
subtasks.description: Reuse src/org/invitation-service.ts with reseller-scope=true to handle invitations during add member flow. Emit audit events on success.
subtasks.details: On add: if email not in reseller_members, call invitation-service(reseller-scope=true). Frontend: modal with invite option. Link invite to member record post-accept.
subtasks.testStrategy: Add new email → invite sent + reseller_members pending record. Accept invite → role assigned. Reuse verifies reseller-scope=true.

subtasks.title: Add frontend modals and UI for team management
subtasks.description: Build modals for add member, edit role, confirm delete. Integrate with CRUD endpoints and handle invitation flow in UI.
subtasks.details: Use existing team templates. Add button → modal (email, role dropdown from §8). Edit/delete icons per row. Success/error toasts. Mobile responsive table.
subtasks.testStrategy: E2E: click add → fill → submit → list updates. Edit role → saves. Delete confirm → removes. Loader states work.

subtasks.title: Implement permissions, audit events, and full testing
subtasks.description: Enforce role permissions on all /team routes. Add audit events for CRUD/invite. Run comprehensive tests including cannot invite to customer orgs.
subtasks.details: Middleware: check session.role in ['owner','admin']. Audit: reseller_admin_audit on add/edit/delete/invite. Block customer org invites via scope check.
subtasks.testStrategy: Invite → reseller_members record + email. Role change → audit event. Customer org invite → blocked. Permissions: non-admin 403 everywhere.

tasks.title: Implement reseller audit system
tasks.description: Build reseller_admin_audit table writes + /audit view
tasks.details: Every reseller action writes to reseller_admin_audit(reseller_org_id, actor, target_customer_id, event, metadata). Reuse src/audit/admin-audit-service.ts patterns. Template matches team-audit.ts filters. Show last 20 events minimum.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify provisioning/suspend/impersonation emit correct events. Filters work (date range, actor, event type). Cross-reseller isolation (reseller A sees only own audit).

subtasks.title: Create reseller_admin_audit database table
subtasks.description: Design and execute SQL to create the reseller_admin_audit table with columns: reseller_org_id, actor, target_customer_id, event, metadata, and timestamp.
subtasks.details: Use similar schema to existing admin-audit tables. Include indexes on reseller_org_id, actor, event, and created_at for efficient querying. Add row-level security policy restricting access by reseller_org_id.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify table creation via schema inspection. Confirm RLS policy blocks cross-reseller access.

subtasks.title: Implement audit event writing service
subtasks.description: Create reseller-audit-service.ts that writes to reseller_admin_audit table for every reseller action, reusing patterns from src/audit/admin-audit-service.ts.
subtasks.details: Define function writeResellerAudit(resellerOrgId, actor, targetCustomerId, event, metadata) that inserts records. Integrate into existing flows like provisioning, suspend/unsuspend, impersonation. Ensure transaction safety.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test insert with mock DB. Integration test: trigger provisioning → verify audit record with correct fields.

subtasks.title: Build backend API endpoint for /audit view
subtasks.description: Implement GET /api/reseller/:id/audit endpoint to fetch and filter reseller audit events, templating filters from team-audit.ts.
subtasks.details: Support filters: date range, actor, event type. Default to last 20 events ordered by created_at DESC. Apply RLS for cross-reseller isolation. Paginate with limit/offset.
subtasks.testStrategy: API test: fetch unfiltered → 20 latest events. Filter by date/event → correct subset. Wrong resellerId → empty or 404.

subtasks.title: Develop frontend /audit view component
subtasks.description: Create React component for /audit view displaying events in table with filters matching team-audit.ts (date range, actor, event type).
subtasks.details: Use table with columns: timestamp, actor, target, event, metadata preview. Implement filter form calling /api/reseller/:id/audit. Show last 20 by default, add pagination. Responsive design.
subtasks.testStrategy: Cypress E2E: load page → verify 20 events displayed. Apply filter → table updates correctly. Metadata expands on click.

subtasks.title: Integrate audit logging into reseller flows and test
subtasks.description: Hook audit writes into provisioning, suspend/unsuspend, impersonation flows. Comprehensive testing for isolation and filters.
subtasks.details: Update task 6,11,15 services to call writeResellerAudit on actions. Verify events: customer.provisioned, customer.suspended, etc. Test cross-reseller isolation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify provisioning/suspend/impersonation emit correct events with metadata. Filters work across date/actor/event. Reseller A cannot see Reseller B audits.

tasks.title: Implement impersonation audit tagging and credential protection
tasks.description: Tag all impersonated writes + block credential decrypt
tasks.details: Modify src/audit/admin-audit-service.ts and src/audit/audit-service.ts: if session.impersonating, add impersonation_session_id to metadata. Update src/credentials/credential-service.ts: if impersonating && !proxy_flow, throw 'MSP impersonation cannot decrypt credentials'. Add banner injection to team templates.
tasks.testStrategy: Start impersonation → perform user add/credential test → verify audit metadata contains session.id. Attempt decrypt → explicit error + audit event. Banner appears on all /team/* pages.

subtasks.title: Update admin-audit-service.ts for impersonation tagging
subtasks.description: Modify src/audit/admin-audit-service.ts to check if session.impersonating and add impersonation_session_id to all audit metadata.
subtasks.details: In audit logging functions, add conditional logic: if (session.impersonating) { metadata.impersonation_session_id = session.id; }. Ensure this applies to all write operations.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create audit event during impersonation → verify metadata contains impersonation_session_id field with correct session ID.

subtasks.title: Update audit-service.ts for impersonation tagging
subtasks.description: Modify src/audit/audit-service.ts to include impersonation_session_id in metadata when session.impersonating is true.
subtasks.details: Apply same pattern as admin-audit-service: check session.impersonating flag and inject session.id into metadata object before logging.
subtasks.testStrategy: Trigger regular audit write while impersonating → confirm metadata includes impersonation_session_id matching active session.

subtasks.title: Implement credential decryption block in credential-service.ts
subtasks.description: Update src/credentials/credential-service.ts to throw error when impersonating && !proxy_flow during decrypt operations.
subtasks.details: In decrypt methods, add guard: if (session.impersonating && !session.proxy_flow) { throw new Error('MSP impersonation cannot decrypt credentials'); }
subtasks.testStrategy: Attempt credential decrypt while impersonating (no proxy_flow) → verify explicit error thrown and audit event logged.

subtasks.title: Add impersonation banner to team templates
subtasks.description: Inject warning banner into all team templates when session.impersonating is active.
subtasks.details: Create reusable banner component showing 'Impersonation Active - Admin: [admin_name] Session: [session_id]' with end impersonation link. Include on /team/* pages.
subtasks.testStrategy: Start impersonation session → navigate /team/* pages → verify banner displays correct admin/session info and end link works.

subtasks.title: Integration testing and audit verification
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive tests verifying full impersonation audit flow and credential protection.
subtasks.details: E2E test: start impersonation → user add + credential decrypt attempt → verify audit metadata tagged correctly, decrypt blocked with error, banner visible.
subtasks.testStrategy: Full flow test + edge cases: non-impersonated writes (no tag), proxy_flow decrypt (allowed), wrong session ID in metadata.

tasks.title: Add telemetry, cross-reseller tests, accessibility, feature flag
tasks.description: Complete non-functional requirements: telemetry events, isolation tests, a11y, rollout
tasks.details: Emit all §11 events via existing telemetry channel. Write cross-reseller test suite (2 resellers × 5 customers, assert 404 everywhere). WCAG 2.1 AA audit on key flows. Feature flag gates all routes. Add session end endpoints.
tasks.testStrategy: Telemetry schema validation. Isolation suite passes CI. Lighthouse a11y score 95+ on dashboard/customer list. Feature flag toggle test: on→all routes work, off→all 404.

subtasks.title: Implement telemetry events for all §11 events
subtasks.description: Emit all required §11 telemetry events using the existing telemetry channel across relevant flows and endpoints.
subtasks.details: Integrate telemetry calls in key locations like suspend/unsuspend, impersonation, dashboard loads, and session endpoints. Ensure events include necessary metadata such as reseller_id, customer_id, user roles, and action outcomes. Validate against telemetry schema.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests verify event emission on trigger paths. Schema validation confirms structure. Integration test captures and inspects events in mock telemetry sink.

subtasks.title: Develop cross-reseller isolation test suite
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive test suite covering 2 resellers × 5 customers, asserting 404 responses for unauthorized cross-reseller access.
subtasks.details: Write end-to-end tests using test reseller accounts and seeded customer data. Test all customer-specific endpoints (dashboard, suspend, impersonation, etc.) from wrong reseller context. Include role variations and audit log assertions.
subtasks.testStrategy: CI pipeline runs full suite; all cross-reseller requests return 404. Verify no data leakage via response inspection and database query assertions.

subtasks.title: Conduct WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility audit
subtasks.description: Perform WCAG 2.1 AA compliance audit on key flows: reseller dashboard, customer list, suspend modal, impersonation pages.
subtasks.details: Run automated Lighthouse audits targeting 95+ a11y score. Manual review for color contrast, keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, ARIA labels on reseller-specific UI elements. Fix identified issues in templates and components.
subtasks.testStrategy: Lighthouse CI scores 95+ on audited pages. Manual testing with NVDA/JAWS confirms navigability. Cross-browser keyboard testing passes.

subtasks.title: Implement feature flag gating for all routes
subtasks.description: Add feature flag that gates access to all reseller-related routes, returning 404 when disabled.
subtasks.details: Introduce reseller feature flag evaluated at middleware level. On 'off', all /api/reseller/* and template routes return 404. Integrate with existing session context. Add flag evaluation to telemetry spans for observability.
subtasks.testStrategy: Toggle test: flag on → all routes accessible; flag off → comprehensive 404 coverage. Performance test confirms <5ms evaluation latency.

subtasks.title: Add session end endpoints and integrate components
subtasks.description: Implement session end endpoints and perform final integration testing across all non-functional requirements.
subtasks.details: Create DELETE /api/reseller/:id/session and /api/customer/session endpoints for proper cleanup. Integrate with impersonation and suspend flows. Run full regression including telemetry validation, isolation tests, a11y re-audit, and flag toggle matrix.
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end: suspend→session invalidate→endpoints cleanup. Full suite re-run confirms no regressions. Load test verifies p95<2s with all features active.

tasks.title: End-to-end acceptance criteria verification
tasks.description: Test all 20 acceptance criteria from §13
tasks.details: Create comprehensive test suite covering every bullet. Include load tests, security tests, role matrix, feature flag, dark launch verification.
tasks.testStrategy: CI suite passes all 20 criteria. Manual dogfood test with Wyre internal reseller org.

subtasks.title: Prepare multi-reseller test environment and seed data
subtasks.description: Set up isolated test environment with 2 resellers, each having 5 customers, and seed data matching §13 scenarios including role matrix variations.
subtasks.details: Use Docker Compose for clean DB reset. Seed via migration scripts from Task 2. Verify row isolation: reseller A queries return 0 rows for reseller B customers. Include feature flag off/on states.
subtasks.testStrategy: Confirm seed data integrity via SQL counts. Cross-reseller query leakage test: assert 404/empty for unauthorized access.

subtasks.title: Develop automated E2E test suite for all 20 acceptance criteria
subtasks.description: Create Cypress/Playwright suite mapping directly to each §13 bullet using Given/When/Then format for functional verification.
subtasks.details: Group tests by feature: org CRUD, customer list/search, impersonation, audit logs. Cover happy paths, edge cases (empty lists, invalid inputs), role-based access (owner vs readonly). Integrate with CI.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run suite in CI; require 100% pass rate on all 20 criteria. Use video recording for visual regression checks.

subtasks.title: Implement load and performance tests for key endpoints
subtasks.description: Execute load tests on customer list/search endpoint and dashboard with 500+ simulated customers to verify p95 <500ms.
subtasks.details: Use Artillery/k6 for 100 concurrent reseller users. Test pagination, trigram search, sort. Monitor DB queries via EXPLAIN ANALYZE. Include feature flag toggle impact.
subtasks.testStrategy: Assert response times, error rates <1%, no DB connection pool exhaustion. Generate load report with percentiles.

subtasks.title: Conduct security and role matrix verification tests
subtasks.description: Test row-level security, impersonation flows, and all 5 roles (owner/admin/support/billing/readonly) across reseller/customer boundaries.
subtasks.details: Automated tests for unauthorized access (404), audit log entries on admin actions, impersonation session isolation. Manual matrix: each role × each feature (read/write/delete).
subtasks.testStrategy: Zero leakage across resellers. Verify audit table has expected entries. Role matrix spreadsheet with pass/fail.

subtasks.title: Execute manual dogfood testing and feature flag validation
subtasks.description: Perform end-to-end manual testing in Wyre internal reseller org, verify feature flag/dark launch, and compile final verification report.
subtasks.details: Toggle feature flag: off=all 404s, on=all flows work. Test accessibility (Lighthouse 95+), telemetry events emitted. Dark launch: traffic split verification. Document gaps.
subtasks.testStrategy: CI suite + manual checklist passes all 20 criteria. Lighthouse audit report. Telemetry schema validation. Sign-off matrix.

tasks.title: Upstream sync — merge feat/billing and feat/credit-ledger into Conduit
tasks.description: Create chore/upstream-sync-billing branch; merge upstream feat/billing + feat/credit-ledger into Conduit main; resolve plan-catalog.ts conflicts preserving env-driven shape; get CI green.
tasks.details:
[CROSS-TAG BLOCKER] Requires platform-ops #1-2 (upstream remote + sync action) before merging feat/billing and feat/credit-ledger.

git checkout -b chore/upstream-sync-billing; git merge upstream/feat/billing; git merge upstream/feat/credit-ledger; resolve conflicts in src/billing/plan-catalog.ts keeping Conduit's JSON env var parsing; port upstream business tier defaults to env schema; npm run lint; npm test; git push origin chore/upstream-sync-billing
tasks.testStrategy: CI pipeline passes; upstream webhook handlers + credit ledger endpoints respond correctly; plan-catalog loads env-driven plans including business tier

subtasks.title: Create chore/upstream-sync-billing branch from Conduit main
subtasks.description: Checkout a new branch named chore/upstream-sync-billing based on the current Conduit main branch to prepare for upstream merges.
subtasks.details: Run 'git checkout -b chore/upstream-sync-billing' to create and switch to the new branch from the latest Conduit main. Verify branch creation with 'git branch -vv'.
subtasks.testStrategy: Confirm branch exists locally and tracks origin/main; no changes yet.

subtasks.title: Merge upstream/feat/billing into chore/upstream-sync-billing
subtasks.description: Fetch and merge the upstream feat/billing branch into the new sync branch, handling any initial conflicts.
subtasks.details: Execute 'git fetch upstream' followed by 'git merge upstream/feat/billing'. Review merge commit and resolve any non-plan-catalog conflicts immediately.
subtasks.testStrategy: Merge completes without errors; git log shows upstream/feat/billing integrated.

subtasks.title: Merge upstream/feat/credit-ledger and resolve plan-catalog.ts conflicts
subtasks.description: Merge upstream/feat/credit-ledger into the sync branch and specifically resolve conflicts in src/billing/plan-catalog.ts by preserving Conduit's JSON env var parsing logic.
subtasks.details: Run 'git merge upstream/feat/credit-ledger'. Manually edit src/billing/plan-catalog.ts to keep Conduit's env-driven JSON parsing; port upstream business tier defaults to the env schema.
subtasks.testStrategy: No merge conflicts remain; plan-catalog.ts loads plans from env var correctly in a quick smoke test.

subtasks.title: Run lint, tests, and fix issues to achieve green CI
subtasks.description: Execute linting and full test suite on the merged branch, fixing any errors or failures to ensure CI passes.
subtasks.details: Run 'npm run lint -- --fix' then 'npm test'. Address all failures, focusing on billing and credit-ledger functionality. Re-run until all pass.
subtasks.testStrategy: npm test exits 0; lint reports no errors; local CI simulation passes; upstream webhook handlers and credit ledger endpoints respond correctly.

subtasks.title: Push chore/upstream-sync-billing branch to origin
subtasks.description: Push the fully merged, tested, and conflict-resolved branch to origin for review or further integration.
subtasks.details: Run 'git push origin chore/upstream-sync-billing'. If needed, set upstream tracking with 'git push -u origin chore/upstream-sync-billing'. Verify remote branch exists.
subtasks.testStrategy: Branch pushes successfully; remote CI pipeline runs and passes; plan-catalog loads env-driven plans including business tier.

tasks.title: Promote plan catalog to plans table
tasks.description: Create plans table with plan_kind column; implement idempotent seeding from PLAN_CATALOG env var on boot; migrate DefaultBillingGate to read from plans table.
tasks.details: Add CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plans (...) to OrgService.initTables(); implement upsertPlansFromEnv() using existing PLAN_CATALOG JSON.parse(); add plan_kind='customer'/'reseller' to schema; update DefaultBillingGate.getConnectionLimit() etc to JOIN organizations.plan -> plans; add reseller-specific fields (reseller_discount_pct, reseller_min_commit_cents)
tasks.testStrategy: Boot server seeds plans table matching PLAN_CATALOG; gate methods return correct limits for reseller vs customer plans; env override works in dev

subtasks.title: Create plans table schema in OrgService.initTables()
subtasks.description: Add CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plans with required columns including plan_kind and reseller-specific fields.
subtasks.details: Define schema with columns: id (SERIAL PRIMARY KEY), name (TEXT UNIQUE), plan_kind (TEXT CHECK ('customer','reseller')), stripe_price_id (TEXT), connection_limit (INT), reseller_discount_pct (NUMERIC(5,4)), reseller_min_commit_cents (BIGINT); add indexes on name and plan_kind; integrate into OrgService.initTables() method.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify table created with correct columns, constraints, and indexes via database inspection after initTables() call.

subtasks.title: Implement upsertPlansFromEnv() for idempotent seeding
subtasks.description: Parse PLAN_CATALOG env var JSON and upsert plans into the new table on server boot.
subtasks.details: Use JSON.parse(process.env.PLAN_CATALOG) to load plans; extend each plan with plan_kind='customer' or 'reseller' based on name matching; implement UPSERT (INSERT ... ON CONFLICT (name) DO UPDATE SET ...) for all fields; call from OrgService.initTables() after table creation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Set PLAN_CATALOG env var, boot server, confirm plans table matches parsed JSON structure including plan_kind and reseller fields.

subtasks.title: Update DefaultBillingGate to query plans table
subtasks.description: Modify getConnectionLimit() and related methods to JOIN organizations.plan with plans table.
subtasks.details: Replace hardcoded plan catalog lookups with SQL JOIN: SELECT p.connection_limit FROM plans p JOIN organizations o ON o.plan = p.name WHERE o.id = $1; handle reseller-specific logic by checking plan_kind; fallback to default if plan not found.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create test orgs with customer/reseller plans; verify gate methods return correct limits/discounts from table data.

subtasks.title: Add reseller-specific fields and logic to plans schema
subtasks.description: Ensure plans table includes reseller_discount_pct and reseller_min_commit_cents; update seeding logic.
subtasks.details: In table schema, add reseller_discount_pct NUMERIC(5,4) DEFAULT 0, reseller_min_commit_cents BIGINT DEFAULT 0; in upsertPlansFromEnv(), map reseller plans to these fields from env JSON or defaults; add application CHECK (plan_kind='reseller' IMPLIES reseller_discount_pct >= 0).
subtasks.testStrategy: Seed reseller plans, query fields return correct values; invalid data blocked by CHECK constraints.

subtasks.title: Comprehensive testing and validation of plans migration
subtasks.description: Test full flow: seeding, gating, env overrides; ensure idempotency and backward compatibility.
subtasks.details: Write integration tests: boot with/without PLAN_CATALOG, verify table seeding idempotent (no duplicates); test DefaultBillingGate for customer/reseller orgs; simulate env changes and confirm hot-reload or restart updates table; lint and run full test suite.
subtasks.testStrategy: Server boots seed matching PLAN_CATALOG; gate returns correct limits for reseller vs customer; multiple boots don't duplicate data; dev env override works.

tasks.title: Add hierarchical org model
tasks.description: Add parent_org_id, org_kind to organizations table; implement OrgService.createCustomerOrg(), OrgService.getResellerTree(); enforce no Stripe customer on customer sub-orgs.
tasks.details:
[CROSS-TAG BLOCKER] Hierarchical org model in billing depends on reseller-tenancy #1 (organizations.type, parent_org_id).

ALTER TABLE organizations ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS parent_org_id TEXT REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT; ADD org_kind TEXT DEFAULT 'standalone' CHECK (...); implement OrgService.createCustomerOrg(parentId: string, planSlug: string) with invariants; OrgService.getResellerTree(resellerId) recursive CTE; assertNoStripeCustomerOnCustomerOrg() in create/update paths
tasks.testStrategy: Create reseller → create customer sub-org → verify parent_org_id + org_kind; attempt stripe_customer_id on customer org → throws; getResellerTree returns full hierarchy

subtasks.title: Add parent_org_id and org_kind columns to organizations table
subtasks.description: Execute ALTER TABLE statements to add the hierarchical foreign key and organization kind column with constraints.
subtasks.details: Run: ALTER TABLE organizations ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS parent_org_id TEXT REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT; ALTER TABLE organizations ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS org_kind TEXT DEFAULT 'standalone' CHECK (org_kind IN ('standalone', 'reseller', 'customer'));
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify columns exist with correct types, defaults, and constraints via schema inspection and test inserts.

subtasks.title: Implement OrgService.createCustomerOrg method
subtasks.description: Create method to provision customer sub-orgs under a parent with plan assignment and validation.
subtasks.details: Implement OrgService.createCustomerOrg(parentId: string, planSlug: string) that sets parent_org_id, org_kind='customer', assigns plan, and calls validation invariants before insert.
subtasks.testStrategy: Call createCustomerOrg → verify new org has correct parent_org_id, org_kind='customer', and plan_slug.

subtasks.title: Implement OrgService.getResellerTree recursive query
subtasks.description: Build recursive CTE to fetch full hierarchy under a reseller organization.
subtasks.details: Implement OrgService.getResellerTree(resellerId: string) using recursive CTE: WITH RECURSIVE tree AS (...) SELECT * FROM tree WHERE org_kind != 'standalone' ORDER BY path;
subtasks.testStrategy: Create reseller → customer sub-org → call getResellerTree → verify returns full tree structure.

subtasks.title: Implement assertNoStripeCustomerOnCustomerOrg validation
subtasks.description: Create assertion function to block Stripe customer IDs on customer sub-orgs.
subtasks.details: Define assertNoStripeCustomerOnCustomerOrg(orgId: string) that throws if org_kind='customer' and stripe_customer_id IS NOT NULL.
subtasks.testStrategy: Attempt set stripe_customer_id on customer org → throws error; reseller org allows it.

subtasks.title: Integrate validations into create and update paths
subtasks.description: Hook assertNoStripeCustomerOnCustomerOrg into OrgService create/update methods.
subtasks.details: In OrgService.createOrg() and updateOrg(), after setting org_kind='customer', call assertNoStripeCustomerOnCustomerOrg(org.id); ensure enforcement on all mutation paths.
subtasks.testStrategy: Full flow: reseller → create customer sub-org → verify hierarchy + no stripe_customer_id allowed on update.

tasks.title: Add reseller columns to organizations
tasks.description: Add reseller_plan, reseller_discount_pct_override, reseller_min_commit_cents, suspended_at, suspended_reason columns.
tasks.details: ALTER TABLE organizations ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reseller_plan TEXT; ADD reseller_discount_pct_override NUMERIC(5,4); ADD reseller_min_commit_cents BIGINT; ADD suspended_at TIMESTAMPTZ; ADD suspended_reason TEXT; create indexes idx_orgs_parent, idx_orgs_reseller; add CHECK constraints in application layer
tasks.testStrategy: Columns exist and accept valid data; CHECK constraints enforced; indexes speed up parent_org_id queries

subtasks.title: Execute SQL to add reseller columns to organizations table
subtasks.description: Run ALTER TABLE statements to add the five new columns using IF NOT EXISTS where appropriate to avoid errors on re-runs.
subtasks.details: Use provided SQL: ALTER TABLE organizations ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reseller_plan TEXT; ADD reseller_discount_pct_override NUMERIC(5,4); ADD reseller_min_commit_cents BIGINT; ADD suspended_at TIMESTAMPTZ; ADD suspended_reason TEXT. Verify in database after execution.
subtasks.testStrategy: Query table schema to confirm all five columns exist with correct types and nullability.

subtasks.title: Create database indexes for reseller performance
subtasks.description: Add indexes idx_orgs_parent and idx_orgs_reseller on relevant columns to optimize queries involving parent organizations and resellers.
subtasks.details: Execute CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_orgs_parent ON organizations (parent_org_id); CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_orgs_reseller ON organizations (reseller_plan, suspended_at); Use CONCURRENTLY to avoid locking production table.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run EXPLAIN ANALYZE on sample parent_org_id and reseller queries to confirm index usage and query speedup.

subtasks.title: Update application models and migrations for new columns
subtasks.description: Modify ORM models (e.g., Organization entity) to include new columns and generate/run any necessary migrations.
subtasks.details: Add fields to Organization model matching DB types: reseller_plan String?, reseller_discount_pct_override Double?, etc. Run migration to sync schema if using tools like Alembic or Django migrations.
subtasks.testStrategy: Load existing org record and confirm new fields are accessible without errors; save with sample values.

subtasks.title: Implement CHECK constraints in application layer
subtasks.description: Add validation logic in application code to enforce business rules on new columns like discount percentage range and positive min commit.
subtasks.details: In OrganizationService or model validators: reseller_discount_pct_override between 0 and 1; reseller_min_commit_cents >= 0; suspended_at only set with non-empty suspended_reason. Raise validation errors on save/update.
subtasks.testStrategy: Attempt invalid inserts/updates (e.g., discount=1.5, negative commit) and verify application rejects with clear error messages.

subtasks.title: Add integration tests for columns, indexes, and constraints
subtasks.description: Write comprehensive tests to validate columns accept valid data, constraints are enforced, and indexes improve query performance.
subtasks.details: Test suite: insert valid/invalid data; measure query times before/after indexes; confirm CHECK constraints block bad data at app layer. Use test DB fixtures with sample reseller orgs.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run full test suite: 100% pass rate; queries using parent_org_id under 50ms with indexes; invalid data blocked with expected errors.

tasks.title: Wire subscriptions table into OrgService.initTables()
tasks.description: Apply upstream 0001_subscriptions.sql; make subscriptions authoritative, organizations.plan denormalized cache; atomic webhook sync.
tasks.details: Add CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subscriptions (...) to OrgService.initTables(); implement webhook handler to UPSERT subscriptions + UPDATE organizations.plan in transaction; add constraint preventing customer org subscriptions; implement getActiveSubscription(orgId) preferring subscriptions table
tasks.testStrategy: Table created on boot; webhook updates both tables atomically; customer org cannot have subscription row

subtasks.title: Add subscriptions table creation to OrgService.initTables()
subtasks.description: Apply the upstream 0001_subscriptions.sql schema by adding CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subscriptions (...) statement inside OrgService.initTables() method.
subtasks.details: Copy the exact schema from 0001_subscriptions.sql including all columns, indexes, and constraints. Ensure idempotent creation with IF NOT EXISTS. Verify table structure matches upstream exactly.
subtasks.testStrategy: Boot server and confirm subscriptions table exists with correct schema via SQL query or describe command.

subtasks.title: Add constraint preventing customer org subscriptions
subtasks.description: Implement database constraint that prevents customer organizations from having subscription rows in the subscriptions table.
subtasks.details: Add CHECK constraint or trigger that validates org_kind='customer' organizations cannot have active subscription records. Use org_id foreign key reference to organizations table.
subtasks.testStrategy: Attempt to insert subscription for customer org → constraint violation; reseller org subscription succeeds.

subtasks.title: Implement webhook handler with atomic UPSERT + UPDATE
subtasks.description: Create webhook endpoint that UPSERTs into subscriptions table and atomically UPDATEs organizations.plan in a single transaction.
subtasks.details: Use PostgreSQL transaction with UPSERT (ON CONFLICT) for subscriptions table followed by UPDATE organizations SET plan = subscriptions.plan WHERE org_id = subscriptions.org_id. Handle all webhook payload fields.
subtasks.testStrategy: Send webhook payload → verify both tables updated correctly or transaction rolled back on error.

subtasks.title: Implement getActiveSubscription(orgId) preferring subscriptions
subtasks.description: Create OrgService.getActiveSubscription(orgId: string) method that queries subscriptions table first, falling back to organizations.plan if no active subscription found.
subtasks.details: Write SQL query: SELECT from subscriptions WHERE org_id = ? AND status = 'active' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1; if null, SELECT plan from organizations WHERE id = ?.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test with org having subscription record, no subscription record, and inactive subscription → correct fallback behavior.

subtasks.title: Update all service methods to use new getActiveSubscription
