subtasks.description: Refactor all billing/gate services to call getActiveSubscription(orgId) instead of reading organizations.plan directly.
subtasks.details: Replace direct organizations.plan queries in DefaultBillingGate, CreditService, etc. with service.getActiveSubscription(orgId). Ensure reseller/customer plan_kind handling preserved.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run full test suite → verify billing limits, credit allocation, and gates use subscriptions data authoritatively.

tasks.title: Implement reseller checkout flow
tasks.description: New onboarding UI picking reseller_plan; adapt /api/billing/checkout to require org_kind in ('standalone','reseller'); block customer sub-orgs.
tasks.details: Extend POST /api/billing/checkout with reseller_plan param → StripeService.createCustomer(metadata: {org_kind: 'reseller'}); createCheckoutSession(items: [{price: plans[reseller_plan].stripe_price_id}]); frontend: reseller onboarding flow with plan picker; 403 if org_kind='customer'
tasks.testStrategy: Reseller checkout succeeds → subscription active; customer sub-org checkout → 403 'billing managed by your MSP'

subtasks.title: Extend POST /api/billing/checkout endpoint
subtasks.description: Add reseller_plan parameter validation and org_kind checks to the existing checkout API endpoint.
subtasks.details: Update endpoint to require org_kind in ('standalone','reseller'); validate reseller_plan exists in plans table; return 403 if org_kind='customer'; add reseller_plan to request body schema.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test valid reseller_plan with org_kind='reseller' → 200; org_kind='customer' → 403 'billing managed by your MSP'; invalid plan → 400

subtasks.title: Update StripeService for reseller customer creation
subtasks.description: Modify Stripe customer creation to set org_kind metadata and use reseller plan pricing.
subtasks.details: In StripeService.createCustomer(), add metadata: {org_kind: 'reseller'} when reseller_plan provided; createCheckoutSession with items: [{price: plans[reseller_plan].stripe_price_id}]; handle standalone vs reseller logic.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock Stripe: reseller checkout creates customer with metadata.org_kind='reseller'; session uses correct price_id from plans table

subtasks.title: Build reseller onboarding UI plan picker
subtasks.description: Create frontend onboarding flow with reseller plan selection interface.
subtasks.details: Design reseller-specific onboarding page; fetch available reseller plans from /api/plans?kind=reseller; plan picker component with pricing display; form collects org details + selected reseller_plan; progress indicator.
subtasks.testStrategy: UI renders plan options correctly; form submission includes reseller_plan and org_kind='reseller'; responsive on mobile/desktop

subtasks.title: Integrate frontend with updated checkout API
subtasks.description: Connect reseller onboarding form to POST /api/billing/checkout endpoint.
subtasks.details: On form submit, call /api/billing/checkout with {org_kind: 'reseller', reseller_plan, org details}; redirect to Stripe CheckoutSession URL on 200; handle 403/400 errors with user-friendly messages; add loading states.
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end: select plan → submit → Stripe redirect; error states show correct messages; session completes → subscription active

subtasks.title: Add comprehensive integration tests
subtasks.description: Implement full test suite covering reseller checkout flow success and failure paths.
subtasks.details: Test reseller → succeeds, subscription active in Stripe; customer sub-org → 403; edge cases: invalid plan, missing params; verify org_kind metadata in Stripe customer; post-checkout org.reseller_plan updated.
subtasks.testStrategy: Reseller checkout succeeds → subscription active; customer sub-org checkout → 403 'billing managed by your MSP'; plans table lookup works; Stripe webhooks update org record

tasks.title: Implement invoice assembly cron
tasks.description: BILLING_ROLLUP_CRON: nightly usage_records rollup; period-end invoice_line_items + wholesale discount + min-commit topup; push Stripe invoice-items.
tasks.details: node-cron.schedule(BILLING_ROLLUP_CRON, assembleInvoices); implement aggregateUsageToRecords() from credit_ledger; generateInvoiceLineItems(resellerId, period) with discount_pct logic; Stripe.invoices.create({customer, subscription, invoice_items}); if sum < min_commit → add topup line
tasks.testStrategy: Cron runs; usage_records populated; test invoice matches expected retail-discount-math ≥ min_commit; Stripe test invoice created

subtasks.title: Implement aggregateUsageToRecords function
subtasks.description: Create function to aggregate usage data from credit_ledger into usage_records table for nightly rollup processing.
subtasks.details: Implement aggregateUsageToRecords() that queries credit_ledger, groups by resellerId and period, sums usage, and inserts/updates usage_records table with proper indexing.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify usage_records populated correctly from test credit_ledger data; check aggregation math and period boundaries.

subtasks.title: Implement generateInvoiceLineItems function
subtasks.description: Create function to generate invoice line items for a reseller and billing period including wholesale discount logic.
subtasks.details: Build generateInvoiceLineItems(resellerId, period) that fetches usage_records, applies reseller_discount_pct from plans/organizations table, calculates retail price, and returns formatted invoice_items array.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test line items match expected retail price after discount_pct; verify multiple usage records aggregate correctly.

subtasks.title: Add min-commit topup logic to invoice generation
subtasks.description: Extend invoice line items generation to add topup line if total sum is below reseller_min_commit_cents.
subtasks.details: In generateInvoiceLineItems, after calculating total, compare against org.reseller_min_commit_cents; if less, append topup line_item for difference amount with description.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test scenarios: sum >= min_commit (no topup), sum < min_commit (topup added), edge case sum == min_commit.

subtasks.title: Implement Stripe invoice creation and push
subtasks.description: Create function to push generated invoice items to Stripe creating invoice for reseller customer.
subtasks.details: Implement createStripeInvoice(resellerId, period, invoice_items) using Stripe.invoices.create({customer: org.stripe_customer_id, subscription: optional, invoice_items}); handle errors and log.
subtasks.testStrategy: Use Stripe test mode; verify invoice created in Stripe dashboard with correct customer, line items, and topup if applicable.

subtasks.title: Setup and implement assembleInvoices cron job
subtasks.description: Schedule nightly cron job using node-cron to orchestrate full invoice assembly pipeline for all eligible resellers.
subtasks.details: node-cron.schedule(BILLING_ROLLUP_CRON, assembleInvoices); assembleInvoices finds period-end resellers, calls aggregateUsageToRecords → generateInvoiceLineItems → createStripeInvoice in transaction.
subtasks.testStrategy: Trigger cron manually; verify end-to-end: usage_records populated, invoice items correct, Stripe test invoice created; check no double-processing.

tasks.title: Invoice + line-item tables + shadowing webhooks
tasks.description: Create invoices, invoice_line_items tables; handle invoice.created/finalized/paid/payment_failed webhooks mirroring to local tables + billing_events.
tasks.details: CREATE TABLE invoices (...), invoice_line_items (...); extend stripe-webhook.ts: invoice.created → create invoices row; invoice.finalized → populate line_items from metadata; invoice.paid → update status + clear suspension; invoice.payment_failed → trigger dunning; always append billing_events
tasks.testStrategy: Webhook events mirror correctly to tables; invoice PDF URLs accessible; billing_events contains full audit trail

subtasks.title: Create invoices and invoice_line_items tables
subtasks.description: Design and execute SQL to create the invoices table with Stripe invoice fields and invoice_line_items table with line item details, including foreign keys and indexes.
subtasks.details: Include fields like id, stripe_invoice_id, org_id, status, amount_due, pdf_url, created_at in invoices; invoice_id, description, amount, quantity, metadata in line_items. Add indexes on org_id, stripe_invoice_id, status.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify tables exist with correct schema via SQL queries; check constraints and indexes are applied correctly.

subtasks.title: Extend stripe-webhook.ts for invoice.created event
subtasks.description: Add handler in stripe-webhook.ts to create a new row in the invoices table when receiving invoice.created webhook from Stripe.
subtasks.details: Parse webhook data, insert into invoices table with stripe_invoice_id, org_id (resolve from customer), initial status 'draft', amount_due, pdf (if available), and timestamp fields.
subtasks.testStrategy: Simulate invoice.created webhook; verify new row created in invoices table with correct data mirroring Stripe payload.

subtasks.title: Implement invoice.finalized webhook handler
subtasks.description: Handle invoice.finalized event by populating invoice_line_items from invoice metadata and updating invoice status.
subtasks.details: On finalized, parse metadata for line items (description, amount, etc.), insert multiple rows into invoice_line_items linked to invoice_id; update invoices status to 'finalized'.
subtasks.testStrategy: Trigger finalized webhook with metadata; confirm line_items table populated correctly and invoice status updated.

subtasks.title: Add invoice.paid and payment_failed handlers
subtasks.description: Implement logic for invoice.paid to update status and clear suspension, and invoice.payment_failed to trigger dunning process.
subtasks.details: For paid: set status='paid', update paid_at, clear suspended_at/suspended_reason on org; for failed: set status='payment_failed', call dunning workflow/service; always insert into billing_events.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test paid webhook clears suspension and updates status; test failed triggers dunning and logs event; verify PDF URL accessibility.

subtasks.title: Implement billing_events logging for all invoice webhooks
subtasks.description: Append a record to billing_events table for every invoice webhook processed, creating a full audit trail.
subtasks.details: In each handler, after processing, insert into billing_events: event_type, org_id, stripe_invoice_id, payload_summary, timestamp, success flag. Ensure idempotency via unique constraints.
subtasks.testStrategy: Process all webhook types; verify billing_events contains entries for each with accurate audit data matching test scenarios.

tasks.title: Dunning cascade implementation
tasks.description: past_due → warning emails + UI banners → suspension after RESELLER_DUNNING_WARNING_DAYS; gateway router rejects tools/call on suspended reseller tree.
tasks.details: On invoice.payment_failed: set org.status='past_due', schedule suspension cron; cron checks due date → set suspended_at; gateway router preHandler: if getResellerRoot(orgId)?.suspended_at → MCP error 'reseller_suspended'; implement warning banners in admin UI; email via existing mailer
tasks.testStrategy: Payment fail → past_due banner after 7 days → suspension → tools/call 429; invoice.paid → immediate restore

subtasks.title: Implement past_due status update on payment failure
subtasks.description: Modify invoice payment failure handler to set org.status='past_due' and schedule suspension cron job.
subtasks.details: In invoice.payment_failed event: update organizations SET status='past_due' WHERE id=orgId; schedule cron job using node-cron or queue with delay based on RESELLER_DUNNING_WARNING_DAYS; log event for debugging.
subtasks.testStrategy: Trigger payment_failed → verify org.status='past_due' → cron job scheduled in queue

subtasks.title: Develop suspension cron job logic
subtasks.description: Create cron job that checks past_due orgs and sets suspended_at after RESELLER_DUNNING_WARNING_DAYS from due date.
subtasks.details: Cron runs daily: SELECT * FROM organizations WHERE status='past_due' AND due_date + RESELLER_DUNNING_WARNING_DAYS <= NOW(); UPDATE SET status='suspended', suspended_at=NOW(); notify admins via existing channels.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock cron → past_due org with due_date 7 days ago → status='suspended' and suspended_at set

subtasks.title: Add gateway router suspension check
subtasks.description: Implement preHandler in gateway router to reject requests for suspended reseller trees with 'reseller_suspended' MCP error.
subtasks.details: In ResellerGate.preHandler(orgId): const root = await getResellerRoot(orgId); if(root?.suspended_at) throw new MCPError('reseller_suspended'); apply to all tools/call endpoints.
subtasks.testStrategy: Suspended reseller root → API call from customer → 429 'reseller_suspended'; non-suspended → passes

subtasks.title: Implement warning email notifications
subtasks.description: Send warning emails to reseller admins when org.status changes to 'past_due' using existing mailer service.
subtasks.details: On status='past_due': getResellerAdmins(orgId) → mailer.send({template: 'dunning_warning', to: admins, data: {days_until_suspend: RESELLER_DUNNING_WARNING_DAYS}}); schedule follow-up if needed.
subtasks.testStrategy: Set past_due → verify email sent to correct admins with correct template data

subtasks.title: Add warning banners to admin UI
subtasks.description: Display UI banners in admin dashboard for past_due and suspended reseller organizations.
subtasks.details: In AdminUI OrgView: if(org.status==='past_due') show yellow banner 'Payment overdue - suspension in X days'; if('suspended') show red banner 'Suspended - pay invoice to restore'; use org.due_date for countdown.
subtasks.testStrategy: Login as reseller admin → past_due org shows warning banner → suspended shows suspension banner

tasks.title: Reseller credit pool implementation
tasks.description: Add scope + reseller_org_id to credit_blocks; update CreditService.hasCreditsRemaining + deductFromBlock to draw from reseller pool FIFO; MSP UI to buy pool blocks.
tasks.details: ALTER TABLE credit_blocks ADD scope TEXT DEFAULT 'org', reseller_org_id TEXT; CreditService.getAvailableCredits(orgId): plan_alloc → org_blocks → reseller_pool_blocks (oldest first); POST /api/reseller/:id/credits/blocks → Stripe PaymentIntent → create scope='reseller_pool'
tasks.testStrategy: Customer exhausts allocation → draws from reseller pool FIFO; pool block depletes correctly across customers

subtasks.title: Add schema columns to credit_blocks table
subtasks.description: Execute ALTER TABLE statements to add scope and reseller_org_id columns with appropriate defaults and constraints.
subtasks.details: Run: ALTER TABLE credit_blocks ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS scope TEXT DEFAULT 'org'; ALTER TABLE credit_blocks ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reseller_org_id TEXT; Add indexes if needed for query performance.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify columns exist with correct defaults via database inspection; insert test records with scope='org' and scope='reseller_pool'.

subtasks.title: Update CreditService.getAvailableCredits for reseller pool fallback
subtasks.description: Modify getAvailableCredits(orgId) to check plan allocation first, then org blocks, then reseller pool blocks ordered by oldest first (FIFO).
subtasks.details: Implement logic: 1) plan_alloc, 2) WHERE scope='org' AND org_id=orgId ORDER BY created_at ASC, 3) WHERE scope='reseller_pool' AND reseller_org_id=resellerId ORDER BY created_at ASC; return combined available credits.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test org with exhausted plan/org blocks draws from reseller pool FIFO; verify oldest reseller block used first.

subtasks.title: Update CreditService.hasCreditsRemaining and deductFromBlock
subtasks.description: Adapt hasCreditsRemaining and deductFromBlock to utilize the hierarchical credit lookup from getAvailableCredits including reseller pool.
subtasks.details: Refactor to call getAvailableCredits internally; deductFromBlock selects and deducts from the first available block in the hierarchy (plan → org → reseller FIFO); handle partial deductions correctly.
subtasks.testStrategy: Customer exhausts org credits → hasCreditsRemaining=true if reseller pool available; deduct succeeds from reseller block and depletes correctly.

subtasks.title: Implement POST /api/reseller/:id/credits/blocks endpoint
subtasks.description: Create API endpoint to purchase reseller pool credit blocks via Stripe PaymentIntent and insert new credit_block with scope='reseller_pool'.
subtasks.details: Require reseller owner role; create Stripe PaymentIntent; on success, insert credit_block(scope='reseller_pool', reseller_org_id=id, credits=amount, etc.); return block details.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock Stripe success → new block created with scope='reseller_pool'; verify credits added to reseller pool balance.

subtasks.title: Build MSP UI components for buying reseller pool blocks
subtasks.description: Develop React UI in MSP dashboard for resellers to purchase credit pool blocks, integrating with the new API endpoint.
subtasks.details: Create form with amount selector, Stripe Elements integration; call POST /api/reseller/:id/credits/blocks; display current pool balance from CreditService.getResellerPoolBalance(); handle success/error states.
subtasks.testStrategy: UI form submits → API called → pool balance updates in UI; error handling displays correctly; e2e test with mock Stripe.

tasks.title: Reseller aggregate caps enforcement
tasks.description: Add reseller_monthly_credit_cap + reseller_monthly_spend_cap to organizations; router enforcement with reseller_cap_exceeded MCP error.
tasks.details:
[CROSS-TAG BLOCKER] Reseller aggregate caps require pricing-decision #6 (discount schedule locked).

Add columns to organizations; ResellerGate.getAggregateUsage(resellerId, period); if usage > cap → router preHandler rejects tools/call; MSP admin UI to set caps; project spend from usage_records + retail_price * (1-discount)
tasks.testStrategy: Set cap → usage exceeds → all customers under reseller get cap_exceeded error; lift cap → service resumes

subtasks.title: Add cap columns to organizations table
subtasks.description: Execute ALTER TABLE to add reseller_monthly_credit_cap and reseller_monthly_spend_cap columns with appropriate types and defaults.
subtasks.details: Use NUMERIC for credit_cap (e.g. NUMERIC(12,2)), BIGINT for spend_cap (cents); add indexes on reseller_id if needed; application-layer CHECK (caps >=0); migrate existing data to 0.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify columns exist with correct types/nullability; insert valid/invalid data and check constraints; query performance unchanged.

subtasks.title: Implement ResellerGate.getAggregateUsage method
subtasks.description: Create service method to compute aggregate credit usage and projected spend for reseller over a monthly period.
subtasks.details: Query usage_records for reseller tree (via recursive parent_org_id); sum credits_used; project spend = sum(usage_records.prompt_tokens * retail_price_per_million * (1 - reseller_discount_pct_override)); cache results.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test with mock usage_records returns correct sums; integration test against DB with multi-level reseller tree matches expected aggregates.

subtasks.title: Add router preHandler for reseller cap enforcement
subtasks.description: Implement middleware that checks aggregate usage against caps before tool/call execution and rejects with reseller_cap_exceeded error.
subtasks.details: In router preHandler: get user->org->reseller_id; call ResellerGate.getAggregateUsage(resellerId, current_month); if credit_used > credit_cap OR projected_spend > spend_cap → throw MCP error; skip for non-reseller orgs.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock usage exceeding cap → request rejected with correct error; usage under cap → proceeds; non-reseller org → no check.

subtasks.title: Build MSP admin UI for setting reseller caps
subtasks.description: Create React components in MSP dashboard to view and update reseller_monthly_credit_cap and reseller_monthly_spend_cap.
subtasks.details: Form with numeric inputs for both caps; PATCH /api/reseller/:id/caps endpoint updating organizations table; real-time validation (caps >=0); success/error toasts; load current values from org record.
subtasks.testStrategy: UI loads existing caps; form submission updates DB; invalid inputs blocked; page refreshes show new values.

subtasks.title: End-to-end testing and documentation
subtasks.description: Implement comprehensive tests for cap enforcement flow and document the new feature for MSP admins.
subtasks.details: E2E: set low cap → generate usage across customers → all get rejected; increase cap → service resumes; document API error format, UI usage, cap calculation formula in README.
subtasks.testStrategy: Full flow: cap set→usage exceeds→rejection across reseller tree; cap lifted→requests succeed; edge cases (zero cap, negative usage, mid-month cap change).

tasks.title: Reseller usage APIs implementation
tasks.description: GET /api/reseller/:id/rollup?period=YYYY-MM, /invoices, /customers; role=owner gating; cross-reseller isolation.
tasks.details: Require role='owner' on reseller org; OrgService.assertNotCrossReseller(user, resellerId); rollup aggregates usage_records by customer; invoices from invoices table; customers = getResellerTree(resellerId) with usage summary; 403 for non-owners/customer-members
tasks.testStrategy: Owner sees full rollup matching invoice; customer member → 403; wrong reseller → 403

subtasks.title: Implement authentication and authorization middleware
subtasks.description: Create middleware to enforce role='owner' on reseller organization and cross-reseller isolation checks.
subtasks.details: Use OrgService.assertNotCrossReseller(user, resellerId); require role='owner' check on reseller org; return 403 for non-owners and customer-members; apply to all /api/reseller/:id/* endpoints.
subtasks.testStrategy: Owner user → passes; customer member → 403; wrong reseller user → 403

subtasks.title: Develop GET /api/reseller/:id/rollup endpoint
subtasks.description: Implement rollup aggregation of usage_records grouped by customer for specified period=YYYY-MM.
subtasks.details: Query usage_records table filtered by reseller tree customers and period; aggregate usage metrics by customer; return JSON with customer-level rollups; handle empty periods gracefully.

tasks.title: Database Schema and Migrations

tasks.details:
[CROSS-TAG BLOCKER] brand_profiles inheritance depends on reseller-tenancy #1 (organizations.type enum). Must land after.

Implement migration file migrations/00X_brand_profiles.sql exactly matching the schema sketch in PRD section 13. Include all CHECK constraints for colors (^#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}$), tier enums, status enums, and indexes. Seed initial Wyre default brand row with placeholder values and populate brand_font_allowlist with common Google Fonts (Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, etc.). Use existing Postgres gen_random_uuid() and TIMESTAMPTZ defaults.

tasks.title: Implement Brand Resolver Core
tasks.description: Create resolveBrand(req) function that implements hierarchical org → parent → wyre-default resolution logic
tasks.details: In src/brand/resolver.ts: 1) Extract target org_id from request context (user's org or sub-org being viewed), 2) Walk org.parent_org_id chain looking up brand_profiles.org_id, 3) Return first found profile or wyre_default, 4) Include version and computed domain field. Handle infinite parent loops with max depth 10. Throw if no fallback found.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for: direct org brand hit, customer→MSP→wyre fallback chain, no brand (wyre default), infinite loop protection, cross-reseller isolation

subtasks.title: Extract target org_id from request context
subtasks.description: Implement logic to retrieve the target org_id from the request object, handling both user's org and sub-org being viewed

subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test: direct user org extraction, sub-org override from query, missing context throws descriptive error

subtasks.title: Implement hierarchical parent chain traversal
subtasks.description: Create recursive function to walk org.parent_org_id chain up to max depth 10, collecting org_ids while detecting loops
subtasks.details: Query organizations table by org_id → parent_org_id. Use Set to track visited org_ids for loop detection. Return array of org_ids in hierarchy order. Stop at depth 10 or root (null parent).
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test: single org chain (3 levels), loop detection (self-parent, cycle), max depth cutoff, root org termination

subtasks.title: Lookup and select first matching brand profile
subtasks.description: Query brand_profiles table by org_id from hierarchy, return first match or continue to next parent
subtasks.details: For each org_id in chain, SELECT * FROM brand_profiles WHERE org_id = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1. Cache individual lookups in Redis (TTL 5min). Handle no matches gracefully.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test: hit on org1, miss org1 hit org2, all miss → continue, cache hit bypasses DB, stale cache refresh

subtasks.title: Enhance profile with version, domain, and fallback logic

subtasks.details: Compute domain from profile.custom_domain or org.fqdn. Set version = profile.updated_at ISO string. Fallback: INSERT/SELECT single wyre_default profile if chain exhausted. Throw BrandNotFoundError otherwise.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test: domain computation variants, version timestamp format, wyre-default creation/reuse, no-fallback error thrown

subtasks.title: Add metrics, logging, error handling, and export function

tasks.title: Host-Header Resolution Middleware
tasks.description: Implement src/brand/host-resolver.ts middleware for custom domain → org_id → brand resolution
tasks.details: Trust-proxy aware Host header extraction. Lookup custom_domains.active by hostname → org_id. Cache host→brand_profile_id in Redis (TTL 60s). admin.conduit.wyre.io forces wyreDefault. No match → 421 Misdirected Request in strict mode or wyreDefault. Set req.brand = resolved BrandConfig. Publish brand.invalidated on Redis pub/sub.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests: custom domain hit→correct org, wyre host→wyreDefault, invalid host→421, cache hit validation, invalidation propagates within 2s

subtasks.title: Implement Trust-Proxy Aware Host Header Extraction
subtasks.description: Create function to safely extract hostname from Host header, respecting trust-proxy configuration and handling multiple Host headers securely.
subtasks.details: Use express trust proxy settings to get real IP. Parse req.get('Host') or req.headers.host, validate format (no ports/IPs), strip port if present. Return normalized lowercase hostname. Handle edge cases: missing header, malformed, multiple headers (use first).
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: proxy headers preserved, port stripped, malformed rejected, multiple headers takes first, IPv6 normalized

subtasks.title: Implement Database Lookup for Custom Domain to Org Mapping
subtasks.description: Query active custom_domains table by hostname to retrieve associated org_id, with proper indexing and connection pooling.
subtasks.details: Write async function findOrgByHostname(hostname) using Prisma/TypeORM. Query WHERE hostname = ? AND active = true AND deleted_at IS NULL. Use database index on (hostname, active). Return {org_id, verified} or null. Add query timeout 100ms.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests: exact match found, case-insensitive, inactive domain returns null, unverified domain handled per policy

subtasks.title: Implement Redis Caching and Special Host Handling
subtasks.description: Cache host→brand_profile_id mappings in Redis with 60s TTL. Force wyreDefault for admin.conduit.wyre.io. Handle cache misses and special cases.
subtasks.details: Use ioredis client. Key: 'host:brand:{hostname}', value: JSON.stringify({brand_profile_id, org_id, timestamp}). TTL 60s. Check admin.wyre host first → wyreDefault. Cache hit bypasses DB. Serialize/deserialize with validation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: cache get/set/expire, admin host bypasses cache/DB, TTL eviction, JSON serialization validation

subtasks.title: Implement Brand Resolution and Request Context Setting
subtasks.description: Integrate with Task 3's resolveBrand() to get full BrandConfig. Set req.brand property. Handle no-match scenarios based on strict mode.
subtasks.details: If org_id found, call resolveBrand(req, org_id). On success: req.brand = BrandConfig. No org_id/resolve fails → strict mode: res.status(421).send('Misdirected Request'), else wyreDefault. Validate BrandConfig type matches Task 2.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests: valid domain→correct BrandConfig on req, 421 on strict no-match, wyreDefault fallback, type safety

subtasks.title: Implement Cache Invalidation Pub/Sub and Express Middleware
subtasks.description: Subscribe to brand.invalidated Redis channel. Create complete Express middleware in src/brand/host-resolver.ts with error handling and logging.
subtasks.details: Redis subscriber: on 'brand.invalidated' → del matching host keys (SCAN pattern). Export middleware function. Add structured logging (host, org_id, cache_hit, resolve_ms). Error boundaries prevent blocking. Graceful shutdown cleans subscribers.
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end: invalidation message→cache cleared→next request DB hit within 2s, middleware doesn't crash on Redis down, logs parseable

tasks.title: Multi-Layer Caching System
tasks.description: Implement LRU in-memory + Redis caching with pub/sub invalidation for brand resolution
tasks.details: 1) In-process LRU (lru-cache npm, 5k entries, 60s TTL) keyed by org_id/host. 2) Redis (ioredis) keys 'brand:org:{org_id}', 'brand:host:{host}' TTL 300s. 3) Invalidation: Redis pub/sub brand.invalidated → drop LRU + DEL Redis keys. 4) OTel metrics conduit.brand.resolve_ms by cache_layer (lru/redis/db), cache_hit_ratio gauge. Include brand_profiles.version in cache keys.
tasks.testStrategy: Load test 10k req/s → ≤5ms P95 cache hit, verify invalidation <2s P95 across 3 processes, cold cache ≤25ms P95, metrics emit correctly

subtasks.title: Implement In-Process LRU Cache Layer
subtasks.description: Create the local LRU cache using lru-cache npm package with 5k max entries and 60s TTL, keyed by org_id/host including brand_profiles.version.
subtasks.details: Install lru-cache, implement get/set methods with composite keys like `brand:org:${org_id}:${version}` and `brand:host:${host}:${version}`, handle JSON serialization/deserialization, configure max: 5000, ttl: 60000ms.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test: set/get with TTL expiration, max size eviction, version-specific isolation, JSON roundtrip validation

subtasks.title: Implement Redis L2 Cache Layer
subtasks.description: Set up Redis cache using ioredis with keys 'brand:org:{org_id}:{version}' and 'brand:host:{host}:{version}', 300s TTL.
subtasks.details: Create Redis client instance, implement get/set/delete with TTL 300s using setex, keys must include version suffix, handle JSON parse/stringify, connect to existing Redis config.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration test: standalone Redis get/set/TTL expiration, key patterns with version, multi-key operations

subtasks.title: Build Multi-Layer Cache Resolution Logic
subtasks.description: Implement brand resolution function checking LRU → Redis → DB fallback, populate caches on miss, return BrandConfig.
subtasks.details: Create resolveBrand(orgIdOrHost: string): Promise<BrandConfig>, check LRU first (60s), miss → Redis (300s), miss → DB query with version, cache both layers, include cache_layer in OTel timing.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test cache fallbacks, integration with mock DB, trace cache_layer hits/misses via metrics

subtasks.title: Implement Redis Pub/Sub Invalidation Handler
subtasks.description: Subscribe to brand.invalidated channel, clear all LRU entries and DEL matching Redis keys on message.
subtasks.details: Use ioredis pubsub.subscribe('brand.invalidated'), on message: lruCache.clear(), redis.eval Lua script or SCAN/DEL pattern 'brand:*', handle gracefully across multiple processes.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test invalidation propagates <2s across 3 mock processes, verify cache empty post-invalidation

subtasks.title: Add OTel Metrics for Cache Performance
subtasks.description: Instrument conduit.brand.resolve_ms histogram by cache_layer (lru/redis/db) and cache_hit_ratio gauge.
subtasks.details: Use existing OTel setup, meter.createHistogram('conduit.brand.resolve_ms', {cache_layer}), increment hit/miss counters, export hit_ratio = hits/(hits+misses), labels: ['lru','redis','db'], emit on every resolve.
subtasks.testStrategy: Load test 10k req/s → verify P95 ≤5ms cache hit, metrics emit correctly, hit_ratio >90% under load

tasks.title: Brand Asset Storage System
tasks.description: Implement Azure Blob primary storage with S3/local fallbacks and SVG sanitization
tasks.details: Azure Blob container conduit-brand-assets/{org_id}/{kind}/{sha256}.{ext}. POST /reseller/brand/assets multipart → validate ≤5MB, MIME sniff (image/*, image/svg+xml), SVG sanitize (svg-sanitizer npm: strip script/onload/xlink:href=javascript), compute SHA256, store metadata in brand_assets table, return CDN URL. Config: BRAND_ASSET_STORAGE=azure_blob|s3|local. Soft-delete via deleted_at.
tasks.testStrategy: Upload PNG/SVG/JPG → correct CDN URL, malicious SVG rejected 422, size >5MB rejected 413, metadata persisted, S3/local fallback works

subtasks.title: Implement Storage Provider Factory
subtasks.description: Create a factory function that initializes Azure Blob, S3, or local storage clients based on BRAND_ASSET_STORAGE config.
subtasks.details: Use @azure/storage-blob for Azure, aws-sdk for S3, fs/promises for local. Support container 'conduit-brand-assets/{org_id}/{kind}/'. Include connection string/env var loading and client health checks.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test factory returns correct client type per config; mock env vars and verify client instanceof checks.

subtasks.title: Build File Upload Validation Middleware
subtasks.description: Create middleware for POST /reseller/brand/assets that validates multipart file ≤5MB and MIME types image/*, image/svg+xml.
subtasks.details: Use formidable/multer for parsing. Implement file size check (413 response >5MB), content-type sniffing with file-type npm. Reject invalid MIME with 415.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test PNG/JPG/SVG pass, oversized file →413, wrong MIME →415, multiple files →400.

subtasks.title: Add SVG Sanitization Logic
subtasks.description: Implement SVG sanitization using svg-sanitizer npm to strip script, onload, xlink:href=javascript before storage.
subtasks.details: For image/svg+xml files only: parse with svg-sanitizer, configure to remove dangerous attributes/elements, re-serialize to buffer. Reject if sanitization fails or removes >90% content.
subtasks.testStrategy: Upload malicious SVG (script tag) → sanitized version stored, verify no JS remains; clean SVG unchanged.

subtasks.title: Implement Asset Storage and DB Metadata
subtasks.description: Compute SHA256 hash, store file via provider to {org_id}/{kind}/{sha256}.{ext}, insert metadata into brand_assets table.
subtasks.details: Use crypto.createHash('sha256') on buffer. Determine ext from original filename/MIME. DB insert: org_id, kind, sha256, mime_type, size_bytes, cdn_url, created_at. Handle soft-delete with deleted_at NULL.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify file stored at correct path, SHA256 matches buffer hash, DB row has correct metadata and unique sha256 constraint.

subtasks.title: Add Soft-Delete Endpoint and CDN URL Generation
subtasks.description: Implement soft-delete via PATCH /reseller/brand/assets/{id} setting deleted_at, generate/return CDN URL in upload response.
subtasks.details: For Azure: generate SAS or use CDN endpoint. S3: CloudFront domain. Local: http://localhost:3000/assets/. Query DB for existing asset by sha256/org_id to avoid duplicates. Return 200 with {cdn_url, id}.
subtasks.testStrategy: Full E2E: upload → get CDN URL works in browser, duplicate upload → reuse existing, soft-delete → CDN still serves but DB filtered out in lists.

tasks.title: Reseller Brand CRUD API
tasks.description: Implement authenticated /reseller/brand GET/PATCH endpoints with validation and inheritance checks
tasks.details: Require MSP-tier org-admin role. Zod schemas validate hex colors, font∈allowlist, HTTPS support_url (no javascript:). PATCH enforces Wyre-locked fields (fonts/radii?), checks allow_customer_overrides for customer tier. Rate limit 10/min/org. Invalidate cache on update. Return full BrandConfig.
tasks.testStrategy: Auth tests: MSP admin→200, customer→403, invalid hex→400, invalid font→400, cache invalidation works, field-level permission checks

subtasks.title: Implement Authentication and Authorization Middleware
subtasks.description: Create middleware to enforce MSP-tier org-admin role requirement for /reseller/brand endpoints
subtasks.details: Extract org_id from JWT claims, validate user role against org_tier='msp' and role='org-admin'. Return 403 Forbidden for unauthorized access. Integrate with existing auth chain.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: MSP admin→pass, customer→403, non-org-admin→403, invalid JWT→401

subtasks.title: Define Zod Validation Schemas for BrandConfig
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive Zod schemas for GET/PATCH request/response with hex color, font allowlist, and HTTPS URL validation
subtasks.details: Validate hex colors (^#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}$), fonts against brand_font_allowlist table, support_url as HTTPS (no javascript:). Response schema matches full BrandConfig structure. Coerce types appropriately.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: invalid hex→ZodError, invalid font→ZodError, javascript: url→ZodError, valid inputs→pass

subtasks.title: Implement GET /reseller/brand Endpoint with Inheritance
subtasks.description: Fetch and merge complete BrandConfig with inheritance checks from org → reseller → wyreDefault
subtasks.details: Query brand_profiles by org_id, recursively merge parent_brand_profile_id inheritance. Include assets, fonts, custom_domains. Cache resolved BrandConfig in Redis (TTL 60s). Return 200 with full config.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests: org with custom brand→full config, inheritance chain→merged config, no brand→wyreDefault, cache hit→fast response

subtasks.title: Implement PATCH /reseller/brand with Field Permissions and Validation
subtasks.description: Handle partial updates with Wyre-locked field enforcement and customer override checks
subtasks.details: Enforce read-only for Wyre-locked fields (fonts/radii) unless is_wyre_default=false. Check allow_customer_overrides for customer tier restrictions. Validate partial input against Zod. Upsert brand_profiles.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests: valid PATCH→200 updated config, Wyre-locked field→400/403, customer override violation→403, partial update→merged config

subtasks.title: Add Rate Limiting, Cache Invalidation, and Final Integration
subtasks.description: Implement org-level rate limiting, cache invalidation on update, and complete endpoint routing
subtasks.details: Rate limit 10/min/org using Redis sliding window. On PATCH success: invalidate org brand cache, publish brand.invalidated event. Mount routes under /reseller/brand. Return full BrandConfig on all responses.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests: 11th req/min→429, update→cache miss on next GET, invalidation propagates to host-resolver, E2E auth→validation→rate limit flow

tasks.title: Reseller Brand Admin UI
tasks.description: Build reseller-admin UI for brand configuration with live preview
tasks.details: Form with color pickers (primary/accent/text/bg/border), font dropdown (allowlist), asset upload dropzone (logo/favicon/og), support urls, allow_customer_overrides toggle. Live preview pane shows :root CSS variables + logo. Calls /reseller/brand API. Responsive design matching existing admin patterns.
tasks.testStrategy: Cypress E2E: form submission→DB update, live preview reflects changes instantly, asset upload success, error states (invalid color, oversized file)

subtasks.title: Design Reseller Brand Admin Form Layout
subtasks.description: Create the form structure with color pickers, font dropdown, asset upload dropzone, URL inputs, and allow_customer_overrides toggle matching existing admin patterns.
subtasks.details: Use consistent admin UI components: 5 color pickers (primary/accent/text/bg/border as hex inputs), font dropdown with predefined allowlist, dropzones for logo/favicon/og images with file validation, text inputs for support URLs, boolean toggle for overrides. Ensure form grouping and labeling clarity.
subtasks.testStrategy: Visual regression tests for form layout, component accessibility, responsive breakpoints (mobile/tablet/desktop).

subtasks.title: Implement Live Preview Pane

subtasks.details: Create iframe or styled div showing admin preview with dynamic CSS injection: map form colors to --primary-color, --accent-color etc., inject logo via background-image or img src. Use ResizeObserver for responsive preview syncing. Debounce updates for performance.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: color/font/logo changes reflect instantly; Integration: preview matches :root vars; E2E: live updates without page reload.

subtasks.title: Integrate /reseller/brand API Calls

subtasks.details: On mount: GET current brand config and populate form. On change/debounce: PATCH updates with Zod-validated payloads. Handle 200/400/403/429 responses with toast notifications. Implement optimistic updates for preview. Add 'Save' button for explicit submission.
subtasks.testStrategy: Cypress: form load→populate, change→PATCH→DB update, error states (invalid hex→400, rate limit→429), auth failure→redirect.

subtasks.title: Add Form Validation and Error Handling
subtasks.description: Implement client-side validation for colors (hex format), fonts (allowlist), files (size/type), URLs (HTTPS), with inline errors.
subtasks.details: Use Zod or Yup: hex #RRGGBB validation, font∈allowlist check, file <5MB PNG/SVG/JPG, HTTPS support_url regex. Disable submit/preview on invalid state. Server error mapping to field-specific messages. Oversized file rejection with dropzone feedback.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit: invalid hex→error display, valid→submit enable; E2E: file upload success/fail, URL validation blocks submit.

subtasks.title: Ensure Responsive Design and Final Polish

subtasks.details: Mobile-first: stack form fields vertically <768px, preview 100% width. Match admin sidebar/header/footer patterns. ARIA labels on inputs, keyboard navigation for color pickers/dropzone. Test Safari/Chrome/Firefox. Add loading skeletons and empty states.
subtasks.testStrategy: Cypress responsive: mobile form usability, tablet split-view; Lighthouse: 90+ performance/accessibility; E2E full flow: load→edit→preview→save→verify DB.

tasks.title: Customer Brand Override UI + API
tasks.description: Conditional customer /org/:id/brand PATCH + UI only if parent allow_customer_overrides=true
tasks.details: Scoped fields only: name, tagline, logo_url, favicon_url, og_image_url, primary_color, accent_color, support_url. Fonts/radii/support_email/from_email locked. API 403 if parent disallow overrides. UI hidden/locked if disallowed. MSP admin can PATCH child org brands.
tasks.testStrategy: E2E tests: customer→403 when disallowed, customer→200 when allowed, MSP admin→200 always, locked fields rejected 403 field_locked

subtasks.title: Implement Brand Override API Endpoint
subtasks.description: Create PATCH /org/:id/brand endpoint with conditional logic based on parent allow_customer_overrides flag
subtasks.details: Check parent org allow_customer_overrides=true for customer requests. Return 403 if disallowed. MSP admin bypasses check. Only allow scoped fields: name, tagline, logo_url, favicon_url, og_image_url, primary_color, accent_color, support_url. Reject locked fields with 403 field_locked.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests: customer→403 when disallowed, customer→200 when allowed, MSP admin→200 always, locked fields rejected 403 field_locked

subtasks.title: Add Backend Permission Validation Logic
subtasks.description: Implement permission checks for brand override requests based on user role and parent org settings
subtasks.details: Query parent org allow_customer_overrides flag. Validate MSP admin role bypasses customer restriction. Validate only scoped fields are modified. Lock fonts/radii/support_email/from_email regardless of permissions.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests verify permission logic: customer with/without parent flag, MSP admin override, field scope validation

subtasks.title: Build Brand Override UI Form Component

subtasks.testStrategy: Component tests: form renders correctly for customer allowed/disallowed, MSP admin, locked fields disabled

subtasks.title: Integrate UI with Backend API

subtasks.details: Handle 403 responses for disallowed overrides and locked fields. Show user-friendly error messages. Optimistic updates with rollback on failure. Real-time validation for color hex formats and URLs.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests: successful updates, 403 error handling, locked field rejection, form validation

subtasks.title: Add E2E Tests and Documentation
subtasks.description: Implement comprehensive E2E tests and update API/UI documentation for brand override feature
subtasks.details: E2E scenarios: customer→403 when disallowed, customer→200 when allowed, MSP admin→200 always, locked fields rejected. Update OpenAPI spec for /org/:id/brand PATCH. Document UI permission flows and field restrictions.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify all E2E test scenarios pass: permission flows, field restrictions, error states, success paths

tasks.title: Custom Domain Management Flow
tasks.description: Implement full custom domain CRUD + DNS verification + ACME TLS
tasks.details: POST /reseller/custom-domains → create pending row, return CNAME target ingress.conduit.wyre.io + DNS-01 instructions. Worker polls DNS every 60s → verifying_tls → acme-client npm Let's Encrypt → Azure Key Vault. Auto-renew 30d before expiry. Status UI with verification instructions. DELETE → revoke.
tasks.testStrategy: Mock DNS/ACME: pending→verifying_dns→verifying_tls→active within 5min, failed state on bad DNS, cert expiry alert, revocation works

subtasks.title: Implement Custom Domain CRUD API Endpoints
subtasks.description: Create POST /reseller/custom-domains for pending row creation and DELETE endpoint for revocation, including database schema updates for custom_domains table with status tracking.
subtasks.details: POST creates pending row, returns CNAME target 'ingress.conduit.wyre.io' + DNS-01 instructions. DELETE triggers revocation logic. Add fields: domain, status (pending/verifying_dns/verifying_tls/active/failed), org_id, created_at, cert_thumbprint, expiry_date.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test POST returns 201 with correct CNAME/instructions, DELETE sets revoked status and cleans cert, 404 on non-existent domain.

subtasks.title: Build DNS Verification Worker
subtasks.description: Implement background worker that polls DNS records every 60s for new pending custom domains and updates status to verifying_dns upon CNAME match.
subtasks.details: Use DNS resolver library to check CNAME points to ingress.conduit.wyre.io. Update status: pending → verifying_dns. Exponential backoff on failures, max 50 polls before failed state. Queue-based processing.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock DNS responses: valid CNAME → status update in <60s, invalid → failed after retries, no infinite loops.

subtasks.title: Integrate ACME TLS Certificate Issuance
subtasks.description: After DNS verification, trigger acme-client npm for Let's Encrypt DNS-01 challenge, store cert in Azure Key Vault, update status to verifying_tls → active.
subtasks.details: Use acme-client library with DNS-01 challenge. Store private key/cert thumbprint in Key Vault. Update domain record with cert_id, expiry_date. Handle rate limits and failures → failed status.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock ACME client: pending→verifying_dns→verifying_tls→active within 5min, failed state on ACME errors, cert metadata persisted.

subtasks.title: Add Auto-Renewal and Status Monitoring
subtasks.description: Implement cron job for cert renewal 30 days before expiry and expose domain status via GET /reseller/custom-domains with verification instructions.
subtasks.details: Daily cron scans active domains, renew if expiry <30d using same ACME flow. GET lists domains with status-specific instructions (CNAME for pending, none for active). Include progress indicators.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock expiry dates trigger renewal, GET returns correct instructions per status, renewal updates expiry without downtime.

subtasks.title: Develop Status UI and End-to-End Testing
subtasks.description: Build reseller dashboard UI showing custom domain status with copyable verification instructions, plus comprehensive E2E tests for full flow.
subtasks.details: React/Vue table with status badges, expandable instructions panel with CNAME copy button. Include polling for live updates. E2E covers full lifecycle + failure/revocation paths.
subtasks.testStrategy: E2E: full flow pending→active in 5min, bad DNS→failed, cert expiry alert, DELETE revokes cert + DB cleanup, UI updates correctly.
