subtasks.title: Add floating tags and latest to release workflow
subtasks.description: Extend release.yml to include vMAJOR, vMAJOR.MINOR, and latest tags during release promotion
subtasks.details: Parse semantic version from steps.semantic.outputs.new-release-version to generate tags like v1, v1.2, latest. Use docker tag command or multiple tags in build-push-action. Remove any existing latest tag push from ci.yml.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run release workflow verifies vMAJOR, vMAJOR.MINOR, latest tags point to same digest as vX.Y.Z

subtasks.title: Remove latest tag from main push and validate workflows
subtasks.description: Ensure no latest tag pushed on every main commit and test complete tagging strategy
subtasks.details: Audit ci.yml to confirm no latest tag logic exists. Add workflow summary outputs showing pushed tags. Test end-to-end: main push creates sha/main only, release creates full semver suite.
subtasks.testStrategy: Push to main shows only sha/main tags; manual release shows vX.Y.Z/vMAJOR/vMAJOR.MINOR/latest; verify GHCR tags match expected strategy (A6)

tasks.title: Modularize azure/main.bicep into separate modules
tasks.description: Split single main.bicep into 5 modular files under azure/modules/ with env parameterization
tasks.details: Create modules/keyvault.bicep, modules/postgres.bicep, modules/gateway-app.bicep, modules/vendor-app.bicep, modules/observability.bicep. Main.bicep orchestrates with parameters: env, postgresTier (Burstable/staging, GeneralPurpose/prod), maxReplicas, vendors[] array, tags={product:'conduit', env:env} on ALL resources. Update namePrefix to mcpgw-conduit-{env}.
tasks.testStrategy: az bicep build --file azure/main.bicep succeeds, validate all resources get product=conduit tag, parameter validation works (A7)

subtasks.title: Create azure/modules/keyvault.bicep module
subtasks.description: Extract Key Vault resources from main.bicep into a reusable module with required parameters
subtasks.details: Move all Key Vault resource declarations to modules/keyvault.bicep. Add parameters for namePrefix, env, postgresTier, tags, and any Key Vault-specific params. Define module outputs like vaultName and vaultUri for main.bicep consumption.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify module deploys standalone with az deployment group create and produces expected outputs

subtasks.title: Create azure/modules/postgres.bicep module
subtasks.description: Extract PostgreSQL resources into modular Bicep file with tier parameterization
subtasks.details: Extract Postgres server, database, and firewall rules to modules/postgres.bicep. Parameterize postgresTier (Burstable/staging, GeneralPurpose/prod), namePrefix, env, maxReplicas, tags. Include outputs for server FQDN and admin credentials reference.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test module with both Burstable and GeneralPurpose tiers using az bicep build

subtasks.title: Create app and observability modules
subtasks.description: Implement gateway-app.bicep, vendor-app.bicep, and observability.bicep modules
subtasks.details: Create modules/gateway-app.bicep (App Service/Gateway resources), modules/vendor-app.bicep (loop over vendors[] array for vendor-specific apps), modules/observability.bicep (App Insights, Log Analytics). All modules accept namePrefix, env, maxReplicas, tags parameters.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate vendor-app module loops correctly with sample vendors[] array of length 2+

subtasks.title: Refactor main.bicep to orchestrate all modules
subtasks.description: Update main.bicep to declare and deploy the 5 modules with shared parameters
subtasks.details: Replace resource declarations in main.bicep with module declarations for all 5 modules. Define top-level parameters: env, postgresTier, maxReplicas, vendors[], tags={product:'conduit', env:env}. Update namePrefix='mcpgw-conduit-${env}'. Ensure all resources inherit tags.
subtasks.testStrategy: az bicep build --file azure/main.bicep succeeds without errors

subtasks.title: Validate deployment, tags, and parameterization
subtasks.description: Test complete deployment pipeline and verify all requirements met
subtasks.details: Deploy to test environment with az deployment group create. Verify: 1) all resources have product=conduit and env tags, 2) namePrefix=mcpgw-conduit-{env} applied everywhere, 3) postgresTier parameter switches correctly, 4) vendors[] array deploys multiple instances.
subtasks.testStrategy: Full end-to-end deployment succeeds, az resource list --tag product=conduit returns all resources, parameter validation passes

tasks.title: Deploy Conduit staging environment
tasks.description: Create conduit-staging-rg and deploy-staging.yml workflow with smoke tests
tasks.details: Create .github/workflows/deploy-staging.yml per PRD sketch: trigger on main push/workflow_dispatch, azure/login with AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID_NONPROD, az deployment group create with env=staging, gatewayImage=sha-${GITHUB_SHA::7}, Burstable Postgres, low maxReplicas. Implement scripts/smoke-test.sh hitting staging.conduit.example.com/health.
tasks.testStrategy: Merge to main triggers staging deploy, smoke tests pass, environment reachable at staging domain (A8)

subtasks.title: Create Azure Resource Group conduit-staging-rg
subtasks.description: Provision the conduit-staging-rg resource group in the non-production Azure subscription for staging environment isolation.
subtasks.details: Use Azure CLI or portal to create resource group named 'conduit-staging-rg' in subscription AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID_NONPROD. Verify creation with az group show.
subtasks.testStrategy: Confirm resource group exists and is empty via Azure portal or az group show command.

subtasks.title: Implement deploy-staging.yml GitHub workflow
subtasks.description: Create .github/workflows/deploy-staging.yml with triggers, Azure login, and deployment parameters per PRD sketch.
subtasks.details: Configure triggers: on push to main and workflow_dispatch. Add azure/login@1 with AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID_NONPROD. Use az deployment group create --resource-group conduit-staging-rg --parameters env=staging gatewayImage=sha-${GITHUB_SHA::7} with Burstable Postgres and low maxReplicas.
subtasks.testStrategy: Trigger workflow_dispatch manually, verify successful Azure login and deployment initiation in GitHub Actions logs.

subtasks.title: Configure deployment parameters for staging
subtasks.description: Define Bicep/ARM parameters in workflow for staging: Burstable Postgres SKU, low maxReplicas, and staging-specific configs.
subtasks.details: In deploy-staging.yml, set parameters like postgresSku='Burstable', maxReplicas=low value (e.g. 2), env=staging. Ensure gatewayImage uses sha-${GITHUB_SHA::7} from Task 5 tagging.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run workflow on main push, check deployed resources in conduit-staging-rg match low-scale Burstable Postgres specs.

subtasks.title: Develop scripts/smoke-test.sh script
subtasks.description: Implement smoke test script that validates staging.conduit.example.com/health endpoint accessibility and response.
subtasks.details: Create executable scripts/smoke-test.sh using curl to hit https://staging.conduit.example.com/health, check for 200 OK and expected JSON payload. Add timeout and retry logic.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run script locally against deployed staging, verify passes with healthy response; fail simulation by blocking endpoint.

subtasks.title: Integrate smoke tests into deploy-staging workflow
subtasks.description: Add smoke-test.sh execution as final job in deploy-staging.yml after successful deployment.
subtasks.details: After az deployment succeeds, add job with uses: ./.github/actions/setup (if exists) then run scripts/smoke-test.sh. Fail workflow if tests fail. Ensure environment is reachable at staging domain.
subtasks.testStrategy: Push to main, confirm full workflow: deploy succeeds, smoke tests pass, staging.conduit.example.com/health reachable (A8 acceptance).

tasks.title: Deploy Conduit production environment
tasks.description: Create conduit-prod-rg with deploy-prod.yml gated by GitHub Environment approval
tasks.details: Create .github/workflows/deploy-prod.yml triggered by release:published, environment: production requiring reviewer. Deploy to conduit-prod-rg with env=prod, GeneralPurpose D2ds_v4+ Postgres. Configure GitHub Environment with required reviewers and deployment protection rules.
tasks.testStrategy: Create test release tag, verify manual approval required, successful prod deploy with separate Key Vault/Postgres (A9, A10, A11)

subtasks.title: Create conduit-prod-rg Azure resource group
subtasks.description: Provision the production Azure resource group named conduit-prod-rg using Azure CLI or portal for hosting prod resources.
subtasks.details: Run `az group create --name conduit-prod-rg --location <preferred-region>` ensuring it uses subscription with prod access. Verify creation with `az group show`. Prepare for GeneralPurpose D2ds_v4+ Postgres deployment.
subtasks.testStrategy: Confirm resource group exists in Azure portal and CLI list shows conduit-prod-rg with correct location and subscription.

subtasks.title: Develop .github/workflows/deploy-prod.yml workflow
subtasks.description: Create GitHub Actions YAML file for production deployment triggered by release:published with environment: production.
subtasks.details: Define triggers: on release published; jobs use azure/login with AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID_PROD, az deployment group create targeting conduit-prod-rg, env=prod, GeneralPurpose D2ds_v4+ Postgres, image from ghcr.io tags. Set environment: production.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate YAML syntax with GitHub Actions lint, dry-run workflow_dispatch if added, check azure/login and deployment commands parse correctly.

subtasks.title: Configure GitHub production Environment with approvals
subtasks.description: Set up GitHub repository Environment named 'production' requiring reviewer approval and deployment protection rules.
subtasks.details: In repo Settings > Environments > New environment 'production': add Required reviewers (specific users/teams), Protection rules: Require approval, Restrict to specific branches/tags if needed. Link to deploy-prod.yml environment.
subtasks.testStrategy: Navigate to repo environments, verify 'production' shows required reviewers list and approval gates are active.

subtasks.title: Implement production-specific deployment parameters
subtasks.description: Update deploy-prod.yml with prod env vars, Postgres config (GeneralPurpose D2ds_v4+), and separate Key Vault integration.
subtasks.details: Add steps for az keyvault create/use for prod secrets, Postgres deployment with D2ds_v4+ SKU, high availability settings, env=prod vars like gatewayImage from release tag, maxReplicas for prod scale.
subtasks.testStrategy: Review ARM/Bicep templates in workflow for correct SKU/sizing, simulate az commands locally against test RG.

subtasks.title: Test end-to-end prod deployment with approval gate
subtasks.description: Create test release tag, trigger workflow, approve manually, verify successful deploy to conduit-prod-rg.
subtasks.details: Follow test strategy: git tag test-v1.0.0, git push --tags to trigger release:published; approve in GitHub UI; check deployment logs, verify resources in conduit-prod-rg, health checks on prod endpoint, separate KV/Postgres (A9,A10,A11).
subtasks.testStrategy: Confirm manual approval required before deploy starts, all prod resources provisioned correctly, smoke test passes on prod domain, no cross-contamination with staging.

tasks.title: Implement Application Insights integration and dashboards
tasks.description: Wire Fastify app to Application Insights, create per-env dashboards with required metrics
tasks.details: Add @microsoft/applicationinsights npm package or OpenTelemetry exporter to Fastify. Create staging/prod Application Insights resources via Bicep observability module. Build dashboards: Gateway RPS/latency/4xx5xx, vendor RPS/errors, Postgres connections/query latency, auth success/failure rates.
tasks.testStrategy: Deploy to staging, generate traffic, verify metrics appear in AI dashboards matching §4.3 spec (A12)

subtasks.title: Install Application Insights package and create Fastify plugin
subtasks.description: Add @microsoft/applicationinsights npm dependency and implement Fastify plugin for request tracking
subtasks.details: Run `npm install applicationinsights --save`. Create Fastify plugin using onRequest/onResponse hooks to track method, URL, duration, status code, and success (status < 400) as shown in Fastify integration guide[1]. Configure with APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING env var.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test plugin registration and mock request tracking with expected telemetry properties

subtasks.title: Create staging and prod Application Insights resources via Bicep
subtasks.description: Deploy Application Insights instances for staging and production environments using existing Bicep observability module
subtasks.details: Extend Bicep observability module to provision Application Insights resources with unique names (conduit-staging-ai, conduit-prod-ai). Output instrumentation keys/connection strings for app configuration. Depends on Task 8 for infra baseline.
subtasks.testStrategy: Deploy Bicep template, verify resources created in Azure portal with correct env naming and connection strings accessible

subtasks.title: Implement custom metrics tracking for key application components
subtasks.description: Add manual telemetry for Postgres connections/queries, vendor calls, and auth operations
subtasks.details: Use client.trackMetric() and client.trackEvent() for: Postgres connection count/query latency, vendor RPS/errors, auth success/failure rates. Wrap database calls, vendor HTTP requests, and auth middleware with timing measurements.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration test: trigger auth/vendor/DB operations, verify custom metrics appear in Application Insights with correct dimensions

subtasks.title: Build Gateway performance dashboard (RPS/latency/4xx5xx)
subtasks.description: Create Application Insights dashboard visualizing gateway request metrics
subtasks.details: Pin Application Insights workbook queries to Azure dashboard: RPS (requests/success/failed), P50/P95 latency, 4xx/5xx error rates by route. Filter by cloud_RoleName='gateway' and environment dimension.
subtasks.testStrategy: Deploy to staging, generate mixed traffic (success/error), verify dashboard shows accurate RPS/latency/error trends matching logs

subtasks.title: Build vendor, database, and auth metrics dashboards
subtasks.description: Create specialized dashboards for vendor integration, Postgres, and authentication metrics
subtasks.details: Create 3 dashboards: 1) Vendor - RPS/success/error rates by vendor; 2) Postgres - active connections, query latency P95, CPU usage; 3) Auth - success/failure rates, token validation latency. Use custom metrics from subtask 3.
subtasks.testStrategy: Full E2E: deploy to staging per §4.3 spec (A12), generate representative traffic, verify all 4 dashboards (gateway + 3 new) display correct metrics matching spec requirements

tasks.title: Configure Azure Monitor alert rules and action groups
tasks.description: Implement all alerting rules from §4.3 wired to Discord webhook
tasks.details: Create Azure Monitor action group with Discord webhook. Add alert rules via Bicep: 5xx>1% (5min), /health 3x fails, PG CPU>80% (10min), PG connections>80%, ACA revision unhealthy, cold-start timeouts. Test each rule with simulated conditions.
tasks.testStrategy: Simulate each alert condition in staging (traffic spike, health fail, etc.), verify Discord notifications fire (A13)

subtasks.title: Create Azure Monitor Action Group with Discord Webhook
subtasks.description: Configure a single action group that sends notifications to Discord webhook for all alert rules
subtasks.details: In Azure Portal: Monitor > Alerts > Action groups > + Create. Add Discord webhook receiver with webhook URL from §4.3. Name: 'conduit-discord-alerts'. Test webhook connectivity. Enable common alert schema.
subtasks.testStrategy: Send test notification from action group, verify message appears in Discord channel with proper formatting (A13)

subtasks.title: Define Bicep Module for Metric Alert Rules (5xx, PG CPU, PG Connections)
subtasks.description: Create Bicep resources for three metric-based alerts: HTTP 5xx>1% (5min), PG CPU>80% (10min), PG connections>80%
subtasks.details: Create alerts.resources.bicep: Use microsoft.insights/metricAlerts with scopes (App Service, PG), criteria (metricName, threshold, timeAggregation 'Average', windowSize), actionGroupId from #1, auto-resolve enabled, severity Sev2.
subtasks.testStrategy: Deploy Bicep, verify rules appear in Monitor > Alerts with correct scopes/thresholds (A13)

subtasks.title: Define Bicep Module for Log and Activity Alert Rules (/health, Cold-start)
subtasks.description: Create Bicep for log search alert (/health 3x fails) and activity log alert (ACA revision unhealthy, cold-start timeouts)
subtasks.details: Add microsoft.insights/scheduledQueryRules for KQL query on /health endpoint failures (count>3 in 5min). Add activityLogAlerts for ContainerAppConsole scale/revision events with specific categories and scopes.
subtasks.testStrategy: Deploy Bicep, validate KQL queries execute successfully in Logs blade, check activity log rule conditions (A13)

subtasks.title: Deploy All Alert Rules via Bicep and Link to Action Group
subtasks.description: Deploy complete Bicep template to staging environment and verify action group association
subtasks.details: Update main.bicep to include alerts module with parameters for resource names/IDs. Deploy: az deployment group create --resource-group rg-conduit-staging --template-file main.bicep. Enable rules upon creation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Confirm 6 alert rules created and linked to Discord action group in Azure Portal > Monitor > Alert rules (A13)

subtasks.title: Test All Alert Rules with Simulated Conditions
subtasks.description: Trigger each alert condition in staging and verify Discord notifications fire correctly
subtasks.details: Test sequence: 1) Spike traffic for 5xx errors, 2) Fail /health endpoint 3x, 3) Stress PG CPU/connections, 4) Deploy bad ACA revision, 5) Force cold-start timeout. Screenshot Discord messages.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify all 6 alerts fire → Discord within 5min, include alert context (metric value, timestamp), resolve conditions and confirm resolution notifications (A13)

tasks.title: Build integration test harness with Testcontainers
tasks.description: Add scripts/test-integration.sh with Postgres container and reseller-tenancy RLS tests
tasks.details: npm i -D testcontainers. Implement testcontainers postgres container spin-up, run migrations/001_customer_tenants.sql, execute vitest --grep 'test:integration'. Add RLS tests using pg_catalog.set_config for session context, verify reseller isolation. Add test:integration npm script.
tasks.testStrategy: Run npm run test:integration locally and in CI, verify RLS isolation prevents cross-reseller data access (A14)

subtasks.title: Install Testcontainers dependency
subtasks.description: Add testcontainers as a dev dependency to the project package.json
subtasks.details: Run `npm i -D testcontainers` and commit the updated package.json and package-lock.json to ensure the dependency is available for integration tests.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify installation by running `npm ls testcontainers` and confirming version is listed without errors

subtasks.title: Create test-integration.sh script with Postgres container
subtasks.description: Implement scripts/test-integration.sh to spin up Postgres container using Testcontainers
subtasks.details: Create bash script that sets up Node.js environment, spins up Postgres container via Testcontainers, exposes port 5432, sets standard Postgres env vars (POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, POSTGRES_DB), and waits for readiness using Testcontainers wait strategy.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run script manually and verify Docker container starts, port 5432 is accessible, and Postgres accepts connections

subtasks.title: Add database migration execution
subtasks.description: Implement migration running logic for 001_customer_tenants.sql inside test container
subtasks.details: Extend test-integration.sh to connect to the Testcontainers Postgres instance and execute migrations/001_customer_tenants.sql using psql or pg_restore. Ensure RLS policies from migration are applied successfully.
subtasks.testStrategy: Connect to test DB post-migration and verify customer_tenants table exists with correct RLS policies via \d+ customer_tenants in psql

subtasks.title: Implement reseller-tenancy RLS integration tests
subtasks.description: Create Vitest integration tests that verify reseller isolation using pg_catalog.set_config
subtasks.details: Write tests matching 'test:integration' pattern that use pg_catalog.set_config('app.current_tenant', 'reseller1') and 'reseller2', insert data for each, then verify cross-reseller queries return empty results due to RLS enforcement.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run `vitest --grep 'test:integration'` and verify all RLS isolation tests pass with no cross-tenant data leakage

subtasks.title: Add npm test:integration script and documentation
subtasks.description: Configure package.json script and document complete integration test workflow
subtasks.details: Add `test:integration`: `node scripts/test-integration.sh` to package.json scripts. Update README with usage instructions, prerequisites (Docker), and expected outcomes. Ensure script is executable (chmod +x).
subtasks.testStrategy: Run `npm run test:integration` end-to-end, verify container lifecycle, migration success, and all RLS tests pass

tasks.title: Author complete ops runbooks documentation
tasks.description: Create all 7 runbooks under docs/runbooks/ per §4.6 specification
tasks.details: Implement rb-incident-gateway-5xx.md, rb-incident-vendor-down.md, rb-incident-postgres-connection-exhaustion.md (with pg_stat_activity queries), rb-rollback.md (ACA revisions + Bicep + migrations), rb-dunning-suspension.md, rb-reseller-offboarding-export.md, rb-secret-rotation.md, rb-customer-tenant-onboarding.md. Each with symptoms/detection/mitigation/resolution/preventive sections.
tasks.testStrategy: Each runbook dry-run executed once by on-call engineer, documented execution results, link from main on-call doc (A15)

subtasks.title: Create runbooks for gateway 5xx errors and vendor down incidents
subtasks.description: Author rb-incident-gateway-5xx.md and rb-incident-vendor-down.md in docs/runbooks/ with all required sections.
subtasks.details: Include symptoms (e.g., 5xx error rates, vendor API failures), detection (alerts/metrics), mitigation (scaling/redirects), resolution (investigate logs), preventive (capacity planning/vendor SLAs) per §4.6 spec.
subtasks.testStrategy: Dry-run execution by on-call engineer, document results in runbook, link from main on-call doc

subtasks.title: Implement Postgres connection exhaustion runbook with queries
subtasks.description: Create rb-incident-postgres-connection-exhaustion.md including pg_stat_activity queries and standard sections.
subtasks.details: Detail symptoms (connection pool exhaustion), detection (pg_stat_activity query for active/idle connections), mitigation (kill long queries), resolution (tune max_connections), preventive (app pooling limits).
subtasks.testStrategy: Dry-run execution by on-call engineer, document results in runbook, link from main on-call doc

subtasks.title: Author rollback runbook covering ACA, Bicep, and migrations
subtasks.description: Develop rb-rollback.md documenting procedures for ACA revisions, Bicep deployments, and database migrations.
subtasks.details: Cover symptoms (post-deploy failures), detection (health checks), mitigation (traffic shift back), resolution (revert Bicep/ACA revisions, migration rollback), preventive (blue-green/canary deploys).
subtasks.testStrategy: Dry-run execution by on-call engineer, document results in runbook, link from main on-call doc

subtasks.title: Create dunning suspension, reseller offboarding, and secret rotation runbooks
subtasks.description: Implement rb-dunning-suspension.md, rb-reseller-offboarding-export.md, and rb-secret-rotation.md with required sections.
subtasks.details: For dunning: pause billing queues; reseller: data export procedures; secret: rotation steps for Key Vault/AKV. Each includes symptoms, detection, mitigation, resolution, preventive measures per §4.6.
subtasks.testStrategy: Dry-run execution by on-call engineer, document results in runbook, link from main on-call doc

subtasks.title: Develop customer tenant onboarding runbook and perform validation
subtasks.description: Create rb-customer-tenant-onboarding.md and validate all 7 runbooks per test strategy.
subtasks.details: Document onboarding steps (provisioning ACA/Postgres/RLS setup). Then execute dry-run for each runbook by on-call engineer, document results, add links from main on-call documentation (A15).
subtasks.testStrategy: Each runbook dry-run executed once by on-call engineer, documented execution results, link from main on-call doc (A15)

tasks.title: Enable security baseline scanning tools
tasks.description: Configure Dependabot, gitleaks workflow, GitHub secret scanning
tasks.details: Create .github/dependabot.yml with npm/docker/github-actions weekly updates. Add .github/workflows/secret-scan.yml with gitleaks-action@v2 using GITLEAKS_LICENSE secret. Enable GitHub Advanced Security secret scanning + push protection on repo settings. Resolve all baseline alerts.
tasks.testStrategy: PR with test secret fails gitleaks, Dependabot creates PRs for updates, zero unresolved security alerts (A16)

subtasks.title: Create Dependabot configuration file
subtasks.description: Create .github/dependabot.yml file to enable weekly updates for npm, docker, and github-actions ecosystems.
subtasks.details: Define version: 2 with update schedules: weekly. Include package-ecosystems for npm (directory: '/'), docker (directory: '/'), and github-actions (directory: '/'). Commit to main branch and verify in repo settings.
subtasks.testStrategy: Check GitHub Security tab shows Dependabot enabled with correct ecosystems and weekly schedule (A16)

subtasks.title: Set up Gitleaks secret scanning workflow
subtasks.description: Create .github/workflows/secret-scan.yml workflow using gitleaks-action@v2 with GITLEAKS_LICENSE secret.
subtasks.details: Configure workflow to run on push and pull_request events. Use gitleaks-action@v2 with license input from secrets.GITLEAKS_LICENSE. Fail on detected secrets. Add to branch protection if applicable.
subtasks.testStrategy: Push a test secret in a PR branch; verify workflow fails and blocks merge (A16)

subtasks.title: Enable GitHub Advanced Security features
subtasks.description: Enable secret scanning and push protection in repository settings under Advanced Security.
subtasks.details: Navigate to repo Settings > Code security and analysis. Enable Secret scanning (push protection) and ensure Dependabot alerts/security updates are active. Verify no billing issues for GHAS.
subtasks.testStrategy: Confirm Security tab shows secret scanning active and push protection enabled; attempt push with known secret pattern fails (A16)

subtasks.title: Review and triage initial security alerts
subtasks.description: Access GitHub Security tab to review all Dependabot, secret scanning, and other baseline alerts generated post-setup.
subtasks.details: List all open alerts by severity. Prioritize critical/high. Use production context filters if applicable. Document findings in a security-baseline.md file for tracking.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify all alerts are visible and categorized correctly in Security overview (A16)

subtasks.title: Resolve all baseline security alerts
subtasks.description: Fix or suppress all identified baseline alerts from Dependabot, gitleaks, and secret scanning to achieve zero unresolved critical/high alerts.
subtasks.details: Merge Dependabot security PRs after testing. Remove false positive secrets. Address code issues. Re-scan after fixes. Update branch protection to require passing security checks.
subtasks.testStrategy: Confirm zero unresolved security alerts in Security tab; Dependabot creates update PRs; PR with test secret still fails gitleaks (A16)

tasks.title: Document SOC2-light control evidence artifacts
tasks.description: Create docs/security/ folder with evidence for each §4.8 control table row
tasks.details: For each control row, create markdown/screenshot artifacts: Azure AD Conditional Access policy, service principal roles list, gitleaks/Dependabot logs, Postgres TDE/Key Vault HSM confirmation, HTTPS/TLS settings, PITR drill log, audit_events retention proof, runbooks link, vuln mgmt process, PR protection screenshots, RLS test results, export runbook, subprocessors.md, dpa-template.md.
tasks.testStrategy: Validate each control has corresponding artifact in docs/security/, cross-reference with §4.8 table (A17)

subtasks.title: Create docs/security/ folder structure
subtasks.description: Initialize the main evidence repository folder and create subfolders organized by §4.8 control table rows for systematic artifact storage.
subtasks.details: Run mkdir -p docs/security/{access-control,encryption,backups-logging,incident-response,vuln-mgmt,change-mgmt,data-protection,third-party}; add README.md with control mapping table referencing §4.8 rows and artifact checklist.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify folder structure exists with git status and tree docs/security/ matches expected subfolders and README content.

subtasks.title: Capture and document Azure AD access control evidence
subtasks.description: Generate screenshots and markdown files for Azure AD Conditional Access policies and service principal roles list.
subtasks.details: Export Azure AD Conditional Access policy configs via portal screenshots; list service principal roles with az ad sp list --all; create docs/security/access-control/azure-ad-ca.md and roles.md with embedded images and config excerpts.
subtasks.testStrategy: Confirm screenshots show policies enforcing MFA/location/IP restrictions and roles list confirms least-privilege assignments.

subtasks.title: Document encryption, backup, and logging evidence
subtasks.description: Create artifacts proving Postgres TDE/Key Vault HSM, HTTPS/TLS settings, PITR drill, audit_events retention, and runbooks.
subtasks.details: Screenshot Postgres TDE status (SELECT * FROM pg_tde); Key Vault HSM certs; HTTPS/TLS via openssl s_client; PITR test log; audit_events retention query results; link runbooks; save as docs/security/encryption/, backups-logging/ subfiles.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate screenshots/logs confirm TDE enabled, TLS 1.2+, PITR restore success within RPO, audit retention >90 days.

subtasks.title: Generate development and change management artifacts
subtasks.description: Collect gitleaks/Dependabot logs, vuln mgmt process doc, PR protection screenshots, and RLS test results.
subtasks.details: Export gitleaks scan logs, Dependabot alerts history; document vuln mgmt workflow; screenshot GitHub branch protection rules; run RLS tests with sample queries; create docs/security/vuln-mgmt/, change-mgmt/ markdown files with evidence.
subtasks.testStrategy: Ensure logs show no high-sev secrets, PR rules require 2 approvals + tests, RLS blocks unauthorized row access.

subtasks.title: Create data protection and third-party docs
subtasks.description: Author export runbook, subprocessors.md, and dpa-template.md with cross-references to §4.8 controls.
subtasks.details: Write data export runbook.md with CLI commands; list subprocessors with contracts/SLAs; populate dpa-template.md from standard GDPR template; place in docs/security/data-protection/, third-party/; update top-level README with links.
subtasks.testStrategy: Cross-check all artifacts against §4.8 table rows; ensure every control has 2+ evidence types (screenshot/log/doc); git diff shows complete coverage.

tasks.title: Create merge-back readiness tracking report
tasks.description: Author docs/merge-back-status.md with weekly GitHub Action update tracking M1-M6
tasks.details: Create docs/merge-back-status.md template tracking M1-M6 milestones. Add lightweight GitHub Action cron weekly: git log origin/main ^upstream/main diffstat, append to report, check test/runbook parity, schema stability metrics. Commit/push updates.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual weekly run verifies diff summary + M1-6 status updates correctly, no merge conflicts (A18)

subtasks.title: Create docs/merge-back-status.md template
subtasks.description: Author initial Markdown template with M1-M6 milestone tracking sections and status table
subtasks.details: Include headers for each milestone M1-M6 with status (Pending/In Progress/Complete), weekly diff summary table, test parity checklist, schema stability metrics, and last updated timestamp. Use Markdown tables for readability.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate template renders correctly in GitHub, all M1-M6 sections present with example data

subtasks.title: Implement git diffstat collection script
subtasks.description: Create scripts/collect-mergeback-stats.sh to capture git log diffstat between origin/main and upstream/main
subtasks.details: Use 'git log origin/main ^upstream/main --stat --no-merges' to generate diffstat, format as Markdown table (files changed, insertions, deletions), save to temp file for report appending. Include error handling with set -euo pipefail.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run script manually, verify diffstat output matches manual git log, no errors on clean sync

subtasks.title: Add test/runbook parity and schema checks
subtasks.description: Extend stats script to check test coverage parity and schema stability metrics
subtasks.details: Implement test parity via 'git diff origin/main upstream/main -- tests/ runbooks/' counting changed files/lines. Schema stability: parse schema files diff, flag breaking changes (DROP TABLE/ALTER COLUMN NOT NULL). Output as checklist items.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock schema/test changes, verify script detects parity issues and stability flags correctly

subtasks.title: Develop GitHub Action workflow for weekly updates
subtasks.description: Create .github/workflows/mergeback-report.yml with cron schedule to run stats collection and update report
subtasks.details: Configure cron '0 9 * * 1' (Monday 9AM UTC), checkout code, run collect-mergeback-stats.sh, append new section to docs/merge-back-status.md with timestamp, git config user/commit/push to origin main. Use GITHUB_TOKEN.
subtasks.testStrategy: Trigger workflow_dispatch manually, verify report updated with new diff section, git commit/push succeeds

subtasks.title: Commit template and workflow with initial run
subtasks.description: Create PR with all components, merge to main, execute first weekly report generation
subtasks.details: Combine all files into PR: docs/merge-back-status.md, scripts/collect-mergeback-stats.sh, .github/workflows/mergeback-report.yml. Document usage in README. Trigger manual run post-merge to populate initial data.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual verification: report contains M1-M6 template + first diffstat entry, no merge conflicts, workflow green

tasks.title: Implement CODEOWNERS and branch protection
tasks.description: Add .github/CODEOWNERS mirroring upstream structure and protect main branch
tasks.details: Create .github/CODEOWNERS mapping Conduit maintainers to paths (src/brand/ @conduit-maintainers, etc.). Repo Settings > Branches > Add rule for main: require PR reviews (2), status checks (ci.yml, secret-scan.yml, etc.), linear history (no fast-forward merges), dismiss stale approvals.
tasks.testStrategy: Push to main directly fails, PR requires CODEOWNERS approval + all checks, merge succeeds only with linear history (part of proposed task list)

subtasks.title: Create .github/CODEOWNERS file

subtasks.testStrategy: Verify GitHub recognizes file and auto-requests reviews from @conduit-maintainers on PRs affecting those paths

subtasks.title: Navigate to repository branch protection settings

subtasks.testStrategy: Confirm settings page loads and 'Add protection rule' button is available

subtasks.title: Configure PR requirements and code owner reviews
subtasks.description: Set require pull request before merging, 2 reviewer approvals, and code owner reviews
subtasks.details: Enable 'Require a pull request before merging', set 'Require approvals' to 2, check 'Require review from Code Owners'. Ensure dismiss stale approvals is enabled.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify PR to main requires CODEOWNERS approval and 2 reviews before merge option appears

subtasks.title: Set status checks and linear history requirements
subtasks.description: Require specific CI status checks and enforce linear commit history on main branch
subtasks.details: Select required status checks: ci.yml, secret-scan.yml, and other relevant workflows. Enable 'Require linear history' (no fast-forward merges), restrict changes and pushes.
subtasks.testStrategy: Direct push to main fails; PR with passing checks but non-linear history blocks merge

subtasks.title: Save branch protection rule and validate configuration
subtasks.description: Finalize and test the complete main branch protection rule implementation
subtasks.details: Click 'Create' or 'Save changes' to apply rule. Create test PR affecting CODEOWNERS paths, verify all protections enforce correctly before merging.
subtasks.testStrategy: Push to main directly fails, PR requires CODEOWNERS approval + all checks, merge succeeds only with linear history

tasks.title: Create bootstrap-keyvault.sh secret seeding script
tasks.description: Implement scripts/bootstrap-keyvault.sh for environment secret bootstrapping
tasks.details: Bash script taking env + subscription args, az keyvault create if missing, az keyvault secret set for AUTH0_CLIENT_SECRET/AZURE_AD_CLIENT_SECRET, MASTER_KEY (openssl rand -hex 32), JWT_SECRET (openssl rand -hex 32), POSTGRES_ADMIN_PASSWORD (openssl rand -base64 32), GHCR_READ_TOKEN, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY/STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET. Document usage.
tasks.testStrategy: Run against test Key Vault, verify all 6+ secrets created with correct values/formats (part of proposed task list)

subtasks.title: Create bootstrap-keyvault.sh script skeleton
subtasks.description: Initialize the main Bash script structure with argument parsing for env and subscription ID
subtasks.details: Add shebang, set -euo pipefail, parse positional args $1=env $2=subscription, define KEYVAULT_NAME=conduit-${env}-kv, export AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID. Add usage help function.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run script with --help, verify usage message displays correctly with env/subscription examples

subtasks.title: Implement Key Vault creation if missing
subtasks.description: Add logic to check if Key Vault exists and create it if not using az keyvault create
subtasks.details: Use az keyvault list --subscription $AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID --query '[?name==`${KEYVAULT_NAME}`]' --output tsv | grep -q . || az keyvault create --name $KEYVAULT_NAME --resource-group conduit-${env}-rg --location eastus --subscription $AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run against test subscription with non-existent KV name, verify az keyvault show succeeds afterward

subtasks.title: Generate and set random secrets (MASTER_KEY, JWT_SECRET, POSTGRES_ADMIN_PASSWORD)
subtasks.description: Create random values using openssl and set them as Key Vault secrets
subtasks.details: MASTER_KEY=$(openssl rand -hex 32); az keyvault secret set --vault-name $KEYVAULT_NAME --name MASTER-KEY --value $MASTER_KEY. JWT_SECRET=$(openssl rand -hex 32); POSTGRES_ADMIN_PASSWORD=$(openssl rand -base64 32); set each with az keyvault secret set.
subtasks.testStrategy: Retrieve secrets with az keyvault secret show, verify lengths/formats: MASTER_KEY/JWT_SECRET=64 hex chars, POSTGRES=44 base64 chars

subtasks.title: Set external secrets (AUTH0, Azure AD, GHCR, Stripe)
subtasks.description: Prompt for and set external secrets that user must provide as arguments or env vars
subtasks.details: Read AUTH0_CLIENT_SECRET, AZURE_AD_CLIENT_SECRET, GHCR_READ_TOKEN, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET from env vars or args. Use az keyvault secret set for each. Add validation for non-empty values.
subtasks.testStrategy: Set test values via env vars, run script, verify all 5 secrets exist in KV with az keyvault secret list

subtasks.title: Add usage documentation and validation summary
subtasks.description: Implement final validation output and create comprehensive usage documentation
subtasks.details: Add summary: echo 'Seeded ${KEYVAULT_NAME}: $(az keyvault secret list --vault-name $KEYVAULT_NAME --query [].name --output tsv | wc -l) secrets'. Create header comment with full usage: ./bootstrap-keyvault.sh prod <subscription-id> [with env vars for external secrets].
subtasks.testStrategy: Run full script against test KV, verify summary shows 9+ secrets, documentation comment is complete and accurate

tasks.title: Port vendor-drift-audit workflow from upstream
tasks.description: Adapt upstream vendor-drift-audit.yml for Conduit's vendor catalog
tasks.details: Copy upstream vendor-drift-audit.yml, update vendor list from prd-vendor-catalog.md or Bicep vendors[] param. Nightly cron pings each vendor MCP /mcp initialize endpoint, files GitHub issue on regressions >24h. Resolve OQ4 by scoping to Conduit vendors only.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual dispatch verifies vendor endpoint pings succeed/fail appropriately, issue creation on regression (A16 equivalent, proposed task)

subtasks.title: Copy upstream vendor-drift-audit.yml workflow
subtasks.description: Locate and copy the upstream vendor-drift-audit.yml GitHub Actions workflow file into the Conduit repository's .github/workflows directory.
subtasks.details: Download or copy the exact YAML content from the upstream repository's vendor-drift-audit.yml file. Place it in .github/workflows/vendor-drift-audit.yml in the Conduit repo without modifications initially.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify file exists in repo with correct upstream content via git diff against upstream source.

subtasks.title: Extract and update Conduit vendor list from sources
subtasks.description: Identify Conduit vendors from prd-vendor-catalog.md or Bicep vendors[] parameter and replace the upstream vendor list in the workflow.
subtasks.details: Parse prd-vendor-catalog.md for vendor names/URLs or extract from Bicep template's vendors[] array. Update the workflow's vendor array or config map to include only Conduit-scoped vendors, ensuring MCP endpoint URLs are correctly formatted.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate vendor list matches Conduit sources and contains only relevant vendors by manual review and count comparison.

subtasks.title: Configure nightly cron schedule and MCP ping logic
subtasks.description: Set up cron trigger for nightly execution and implement HTTP ping to each vendor's /mcp initialize endpoint with response validation.
subtasks.details: Define cron: '0 2 * * *' for ~2AM UTC nightly. Add steps using curl or similar to GET/POST each vendor's /mcp/initialize endpoint, capture status code/response time, and flag failures (non-2xx, timeouts >30s). Store results in artifacts/JSON.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual workflow_dispatch checks cron syntax and ping logic executes without YAML errors.

subtasks.title: Implement regression detection and GitHub issue filing
subtasks.description: Add logic to detect regressions lasting >24h by comparing current ping results against previous runs and auto-create GitHub issues on failures.
subtasks.details: Use GitHub API or state storage to track historical ping status per vendor. If failure persists >24h (compare timestamps), use gh cli or API to file issue with template including vendor, failure details, timestamps, and regression duration. Scope to Conduit vendors only.
subtasks.testStrategy: Simulate regression by mocking failed pings; verify issue created with correct details and >24h threshold respected.

subtasks.title: Test, validate, and resolve OQ4 scoping
subtasks.description: Conduct full workflow testing, ensure Conduit-only scoping resolves OQ4, and enable for production use.
subtasks.details: Run manual dispatch to verify pings succeed/fail appropriately for Conduit vendors, issues create on regressions. Confirm no upstream vendors included (OQ4 fix). Update permissions/secrets if needed (e.g., GITHUB_TOKEN for issues). Commit and PR for review.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual dispatch verifies endpoint pings, regression issue creation, Conduit scoping; monitor first nightly run post-merge.

tasks.details: Create `docs-site/docs/agents-concepts.md` (public) and `docs-site/internal/agents-impl.md`. Add upstream front-matter to both. Split: public=concepts for MSPs, internal=impl details. Apply terminology pass.
tasks.testStrategy: Confirm split covers full upstream content, no drift, vale passes, appropriate sections public/internal.

subtasks.title: Copy upstream agents.md to new files
subtasks.description: Fork the content from mcp-gateway/docs/agents.md into the two new target files in docs-site.
subtasks.details: Copy full content of mcp-gateway/docs/agents.md to docs-site/docs/agents-concepts.md and docs-site/internal/agents-impl.md. Preserve all markdown formatting, code blocks, and structure during initial copy.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify both new files contain identical full content to upstream source via diff check.

subtasks.title: Add upstream front-matter to both files
subtasks.description: Insert required upstream reference front-matter in YAML format to both agents-concepts.md and agents-impl.md.
subtasks.details: Add front-matter block at top of each file: upstream: mcp-gateway/docs/agents.md and upstream_sha: <current SHA>. Ensure valid YAML syntax and no content disruption.
subtasks.testStrategy: Confirm front-matter parses correctly and matches upstream path/SHA in both files.

subtasks.title: Split content into public concepts and internal impl
subtasks.description: Divide the agents.md content: concepts for MSPs in public file, implementation details in internal file.
subtasks.details: Public (agents-concepts.md): High-level concepts, MSP usage patterns, architecture overview. Internal (agents-impl.md): Code details, config options, deployment internals, troubleshooting. Remove redundant sections.
subtasks.testStrategy: Ensure no content loss: combined files cover 100% of original agents.md. Public file understandable without internal knowledge.

subtasks.title: Apply terminology and style guide pass
subtasks.description: Review and update terminology across both files to match project style guide and MSP audience.
subtasks.details: Run terminology replacement: Wyre→Conduit, internal→MSP-appropriate terms. Ensure consistent voice: public=approachable, internal=technical. Fix any markdown inconsistencies introduced during split.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run vale linter on both files (0 warnings), manual spot-check 5 key terms per file for consistency.

subtasks.title: Validate split completeness and run linters
subtasks.description: Confirm full coverage of upstream content and verify docs quality with CI tools.
subtasks.details: Diff both files against original to confirm no drift/missing sections. Run linkinator, vale, cspell on docs-site/. Commit with clear split summary in message.
subtasks.testStrategy: CI passes: 0 broken links, vale clean, spelling OK. Manual review confirms public/internal sections appropriately split per AC.

subtasks.testStrategy: Verify file exists at correct path, front-matter is properly formatted and contains upstream metadata, content matches upstream.

subtasks.testStrategy: Confirm file creation at docs-site/docs/teams-orgs.md, validate front-matter structure, ensure initial content sync with upstream.

subtasks.description: Copy upstream security documentation and expand with MSP-specific data residency and isolation sections.
subtasks.details: Create docs-site/docs/security.md from upstream source, add front-matter, insert new sections covering MSP data residency requirements, customer isolation policies, and compliance standards.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify base content forked correctly, confirm MSP-specific sections added with relevant details, check front-matter presence.

subtasks.title: Apply terminology pass to all three documents

subtasks.title: Verify rebranding, run linters, and commit changes

subtasks.details: Run full CI pipeline including vale/linkinator, verify upstream front-matter intact, confirm MSP framing complete, commit with message referencing D16/D22/D20 and parent Task 8.
subtasks.testStrategy: CI passes with 0 linter violations, all links resolve, manual review confirms complete rebranding and MSP-specific security additions present.

tasks.title: Build OpenAPI-driven API reference [D10]
tasks.description: Integrate OpenAPI spec rendering into docs site.
tasks.details: Use Redocly or @stoplight/elements (decide OQ6, default Redocly). Embed `/openapi.json` at `docs-site/docs/api-reference.mdx`. Add CI script to fail build if spec misses `src/` routes (use spectral or custom validator). Document auth per endpoint.
tasks.testStrategy: Confirm all non-health endpoints rendered with auth docs, CI fails on missing spec endpoints, link-check.

subtasks.title: Decide on OpenAPI rendering tool
subtasks.description: Evaluate Redocly vs @stoplight/elements and select the best option for embedding OpenAPI spec in docs site.
subtasks.details: Review documentation for Redocly (default) and @stoplight/elements. Consider factors like MDX integration, customization options, bundle size, and Starlight/Astro compatibility. Document decision in task comments with OQ6 reference.
subtasks.testStrategy: Confirm selected tool renders sample OpenAPI spec correctly in a test MDX page.

subtasks.title: Embed OpenAPI spec in api-reference.mdx
subtasks.description: Create docs-site/docs/api-reference.mdx and integrate the chosen renderer to load /openapi.json.
subtasks.details: Install chosen tool via npm in docs-site. Add MDX component embedding /openapi.json endpoint. Ensure responsive design and proper sidebar navigation entry. Handle loading states and errors gracefully.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify spec renders all endpoints at localhost:4321/docs/api-reference, check mobile responsiveness.

subtasks.title: Implement CI validation script for spec coverage
subtasks.description: Create CI script that fails build if OpenAPI spec misses routes defined in src/.
subtasks.details: Choose Spectral or build custom validator. Parse src/ route files (Express/Fastify?) and compare against openapi.json paths. Add as GitHub Actions step in docs-site/.github/workflows. Use Spectral linter if possible for OAS validation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run CI locally; confirm fails when removing a src/ route from spec, passes when complete.

subtasks.title: Add authentication documentation to endpoints
subtasks.description: Update OpenAPI spec to document authentication requirements per endpoint.
subtasks.details: Add securitySchemes (Bearer/JWT?) to global components. Reference schemes in operation security arrays. Include auth flows, required scopes/roles per endpoint. Use x- extensions if needed for custom auth details.
subtasks.testStrategy: Confirm auth info visible in rendered docs for all non-health endpoints; validate spec with Spectral.

subtasks.title: Test and validate complete API reference integration
subtasks.description: Run comprehensive tests including rendering, CI validation, and link checking.
subtasks.details: Execute linkinator on built site. Test all non-health endpoints render with auth docs. Trigger CI failures by modifying spec. Deploy to preview and validate production-like rendering.
subtasks.testStrategy: CI passes with full spec; fails on missing endpoints; all links work; auth docs visible and accurate.

subtasks.title: Implement upstream HEAD fetching with private auth
subtasks.description: Add function to fetch latest commit SHA and content from upstream repo using OQ8 auth.
subtasks.details: Use Octokit.graphql or rest API with private token (OQ8). Handle multiple upstream repos per doc. Cache results to avoid rate limits.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock Octokit responses, verify fetches correct SHA/content for private mcp-gateway repo.

subtasks.title: Add content diffing with >5% change threshold
subtasks.description: Implement diff logic comparing local doc vs upstream HEAD, calculate change percentage.
subtasks.details: Strip front-matter, use `diff` library or Levenshtein distance. Flag changes if >5% (line/token based). Generate markdown diff summary.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test with sample docs: 0%, 3%, 7%, 20% changes. Verify threshold detection.

subtasks.title: Implement GitHub issue creation for changes
subtasks.description: Create docs-sync issue with diff summary when changes exceed threshold.
subtasks.details: Use Octokit.issues.create(). Template: doc path, % change, diff snippet, upstream HEAD SHA. Label 'docs-sync', assign docs team. Check existing issues first.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock issue creation, verify payload has correct title/body/labels. Test duplicate detection.

subtasks.title: Setup GitHub Action workflow and manual trigger
subtasks.description: Create .github/workflows/docs-upstream-sync.yml with cron schedule and manual dispatch.
subtasks.details: Cron: daily 00:00 UTC. Run npx tsx scripts/docs-upstream-diff.ts. Use WORKFLOW_TOKEN secret for OQ8 auth. Add inputs for dry-run/manual doc targeting.
subtasks.testStrategy: Trigger manually on sample doc, verify issue creation in test repo. Check cron schedule in Actions tab.

tasks.title: v1 publish: review ACs, sign-offs, deploy
tasks.description: Final task to verify all acceptance criteria and launch.
tasks.details: Checklist AC 1-15: build/deploy, all 28 docs linked, OpenAPI complete, vendor guides, linters, internal gating, etc. Product/DevRel sign-off. Flip DNS to docs.conduit.example.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual audit of site vs ACs, external reviewer feedback via previews.

subtasks.title: Compile and audit AC 1-15 checklist
subtasks.description: Create a comprehensive checklist for all 15 acceptance criteria and verify each item status against current implementation.
subtasks.details: Review build/deploy pipelines, confirm all 28 docs linked in sidebar, validate OpenAPI spec completeness, check vendor guides presence, run linters (vale/linkinator), verify internal gating mechanisms. Document pass/fail for each AC with evidence links.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual checklist audit using PR previews and staging site; screenshot evidence for each AC.

subtasks.title: Verify documentation completeness and links
subtasks.description: Confirm all 28 docs are properly linked, OpenAPI is complete, and vendor guides are in place.
subtasks.details: Run linkinator on built site, count sidebar entries to match 28 docs, validate OpenAPI at /openapi.json endpoint, review vendor guides folder for coverage of key integrations (e.g., AWS, GCP). Fix any broken links or missing files.
subtasks.testStrategy: Automated link checking via `linkinator dist/` and manual navigation test of all sidebar items.

subtasks.title: Obtain Product and DevRel sign-offs
subtasks.description: Schedule and collect formal sign-off from Product and DevRel teams on final v1 content.
subtasks.details: Share staging preview URL (Netlify/Vercel), create sign-off form covering ACs, style guide enforcement, terminology accuracy, and launch readiness. Record approvals in project ticket with reviewer comments.
subtasks.testStrategy: Confirmation emails/slack threads from designated approvers; fallback to recorded video walkthrough if needed.

subtasks.title: Execute final build, linting, and internal gating
subtasks.description: Run complete build pipeline, linters, and pass all internal quality gates.
subtasks.details: Execute `npm run build`, run `vale .`, `linkinator dist/`, confirm 0 violations. Verify internal gating (security scans, accessibility checks) passes. Tag release as `v1.0.0` and push to main.
subtasks.testStrategy: CI pipeline green status + local build verification matching production output.

subtasks.title: Deploy to production and flip DNS
subtasks.description: Trigger production deploy and update DNS to point docs.conduit.example to live site.
subtasks.details: Deploy via Netlify/Vercel production environment, monitor deploy logs for success, update DNS A/CNAME record for docs.conduit.example to production IP/hostname. Verify site loads at new domain with SSL.
subtasks.testStrategy: Curl/wget test from multiple regions, browser validation on prod domain, SSL certificate check.
